title: Social Media Strategist
description:
We are a full-service digital marketing and consulting agency focused on helping female-owned businesses grow with intention, strategy, and systems. We don’t believe in surface-level marketing. We build ecosystems that generate leads, nurture relationships, and convert consistently, all while keeping the business in alignment with the business owner and her audience.



We are expanding and looking for a Social Media Strategist who can think beyond posting content and step into a true strategic role within our company and eventually across our client portfolio.

About the Role-

This is not a “post and schedule” position. 

We are looking for someone who understands how social media functions as a lead generation and conversion engine.

You will be responsible for developing and executing a full social media strategy that drives visibility, engagement, and measurable business growth. You will act as an extension of the brand voice, bringing strategy, creativity, and consistency together across all platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Strategy Development

-Analyze current social presence and identify growth opportunities

  -Develop platform-specific strategies for:

  
 + Instagram

  -LinkedIn

  -TikTok

  -YouTube

-Identify content themes, messaging angles, and audience targeting strategies

-Build a clear roadmap for lead generation and conversion through social channels



Content Creation + Execution

-Plan and create content aligned with strategic goals (not random posting)

-Develop:

   *Short-form video (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

   *Static posts and carousels

   *Long-form content for YouTube

 -Write captions that drive engagement and action

 -Maintain brand voice across all content



Publishing + Management

-Schedule and publish content across all platforms

-Maintain a consistent posting cadence

-Optimize posting times and formats based on performance



Engagement + Community Building

-Respond to comments and messages in a timely, on-brand manner

-Engage with audience to build relationships and trust

-Identify opportunities to convert engagement into leads



Growth + Optimization

-Track performance metrics and adjust strategy accordingly

-Identify trends, platform updates, and opportunities for growth

-Continuously refine content and messaging based on data



What We’re Looking For

This role is for someone who:

-Thinks like a strategist, not just a content creator

-Understands the connection between content, audience psychology, and conversion

-Can see the big picture while executing the details

-Is proactive and brings ideas to the table

-Is comfortable being the voice of a brand

-Understands different tones for different platforms



Required Experience

-Proven experience managing and growing accounts on:

 + Instagram

LinkedIn

TikTok

YouTube

-Experience creating both short-form and long-form video content

-Strong copywriting skills for social media

-Understanding of lead generation strategies through content

-Experience with scheduling tools and analytics platforms



Bonus (Not Required but Valuable)

-Experience working with agencies or multiple brands

-Familiarity with Go High Level or CRM-based marketing systems

-Experience in service-based businesses, consulting, or coaching industries

-Basic understanding of funnels,
 marketing, or customer journeys



What Success Looks Like in This Role

-Increased visibility and engagement across platforms

-Consistent growth in audience and reach

-Clear improvement in lead generation from social channels

-Content that feels aligned, intentional, and on-brand

-A strategy that evolves based on data, not guesswork



Why Join Us

-Opportunity to grow into a key strategic role within the company

-Work across multiple brands and industries

-Be part of a company that values strategy, systems, and intentional growth

-Room to expand into a leadership position as we scale



How to Apply

Please submit:

-Your resume (and use the keyword DETAILED in your subject line)

-Links to accounts you’ve managed

-A brief overview of how you approach social media strategy for lead generation





If you’re someone who understands that social media is more than content, and you’re excited to build something meaningful and scalable... we’d love to hear from you. 



Note: Any submissions without the keyword will be deleted. Why? Because attention to detail is a key component in every aspect of our business. And it starts from the 
nt you d
 to apply with us.

title: Transaction Coordinator (Real Estate)
description:
PropZap — Elite Operators Wanted. Build the Backbone. Lead the Future.



We’re building one of the fastest-growing real estate and technology platforms in Canada.

And now, we’re looking for a Real Estate Operations Lead who wants more than a job.

Not someone who wants a title without execution.

Not someone who manages from the sidelines.

Not someone who avoids pressure.



This role is for a hands-on operator who wants to master the systems, own the backend, and grow into true operational leadership inside a scaling real estate business.



If you are the person teams rely on.

If you see inefficiencies before others do.

If you want to build, lead, and scale operations the right way.

We want you.



---

Role: Transaction Coordinator

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Shift: Night Shift — Work on Canada MST

Role Type: Full-time, long-term

Compensation: Top-tier salary + performance bonuses + growth-based increases

Company: PropZap — Tech-enabled real estate platform revolutionizing home buying and selling in Canada



This is a foundational operations leadership role.



You will start by working deeply hands-on in the systems, processes, and daily execution. Over time, you will help design, grow, and lead the operations function as the company scales.



---

Your Core Responsibilities:

You will own and lead the backend operations that power our agents and client experience.

Full Real Estate Operations Leadership (Hands-On)



You will personally execute and oversee:

- Transaction and listing coordination

• Contract preparation, amendments, compliance, and document management

• MLS drafts, uploads, and accuracy checks

• FINTRAC, signatures, deadlines, and audit-ready files

• CRM hygiene, pipelines, task boards, and workflow tracking

• Calendar management, reminders, and operational follow-ups



You will ensure nothing slips, nothing is messy, and everything is executed with precision.



Listing & Marketing Operations:

- Coordinate photos, drone, measurements, floorplans, and virtual tours

• Manage listing timelines, deliverables, and launch readiness

• Prepare polished listing descriptions and marketing instructions

• Oversee signs, lockboxes, open houses, and showing instructions

• Maintain organized listing folders, media libraries, and assets

• Coordinate with marketing vendors and internal resources



Agent & Client Backend Support:

- Act as the primary operational support behind agents

• Communicate professionally with clients, lawyers, vendors, and partners

• Track conditions, deadlines, and next steps

• Ensure agents can focus on selling while operations run flawlessly



Systems, Process, and Scale:

- Maintain clean, reliable, and scalable operational systems

• Identify inefficiencies and proactively improve workflows

• Document processes and help build SOPs as the business evolves

• Support leadership with operational insights and execution

• Assist in hiring, training, and onboarding future operations tea
mbers



This role evolves. As the company grows, you grow into leading the operations team, not just running tasks.



---

Who You Are:

We are only interested in elite operators with leadership potential.

- You have strong experience in U.S. or Canadian real estate operations

• You are execution-first, not theory-only

• You thrive in structured systems and enjoy building order

• You move fast without sacrificing accuracy

• You anticipate problems and solve them before escalation

• You communicate clearly, professionally, and confidently

• You are calm under pressure and comfortable with volume

• You want long-term growth, responsibility, and leadership

• You want to build something meaningful, not just complete tasks



If you want micromanagement, slow pace, or narrow scope, this role is not for you.



---

Requirements:

- 3–6+ years experience in real estate operations, such as:

– Real Estate VA

– Transaction Coordinator

– Listing Manager

– Operations or Executive Assistant

• Experience with Canadian or U.S. real estate documents and MLS

• Strong English communication skills

• Comfortable with CRMs, Google Workspace, DocuSign, MLS systems

• Excellent attention to detail and operational discipline

• Fast computer, stable internet, and backup power

• Ability to work full night shift on Canada Mountain Time



Bonus If You Have:

- Experience leading or mentoring other operators

• Process improvement or operations management background

• Startup or fast-scaling company experience

• Marketing coordination or Canva familiarity



---

What We Offer:

- Top-tier compensation above PH market

• Performance bonuses tied to impact

• Long-term, stable role with real growth

• Direct collaboration with founders and leadership

• Clear path into Operational leadership

• Early-seat role in a fast-scaling Canadian proptech company

• A position where your work directly shapes how the business scales



This is not just an operations role.

This is a career-defining opportunity to build, lead, and scale real estate operations from the inside.



---

How to Apply



Send the following to: 

- Resume

- Portfolio (if available)

• 2-minute intro video explaining why you are top 1%

• Summary of your real estate operations experience

• Expected monthly salary (PHP)

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result



Subject Line: Transaction Coordinator – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. This includes missing documents, incorrect subject lines, incomplete information, or not submitting all requested materials. Attention to detail is critical in this role, and the application process is the first test of your ability to follow instructions accurately and completely.



If you want to own the backend, lead through execution, and grow into real operational leadership, this role was built for you.

title: Full-Stack / Platform Engineer — TypeScript, Node, Postgres, Python
description:
Full-Stack / Platform Engineer — TypeScript, Node, Postgres, Python

Employment type: Full-time

Location: Fully remote (work from anywhere in [country/region — e.g. “the United States” or “GMT±3 overlap”])



We’re hiring an engineer to build and run a multi-service platform: web apps, APIs, background workers, relational data, and supporting Python services (streaming/batch jobs and ML-adjacent tooling). You’ll work across the stack with a bias toward reliable production systems—clear service boundaries, safe schema changes, and operable deployments.



What you’ll do

Ship and maintain Next.js / React / TypeScript frontends and integrate them with backend APIs.

Design and implement Node.js (Express-style) HTTP APIs and supporting services in TypeScript.

Own PostgreSQL usage: modeling, queries, and migrations in coordination with deploys.

Build and tune background workers and scheduled jobs (ingestion, sync, aggregation)—including failure modes, retries, and basic observability.

Contribute to Python services where needed: streaming/event processing, automation, or training/inference pipelines.

Collaborate on ops practices: env/config discipline, health checks, logging, and deployment patterns (containers and/or process supervision).

What we’re looking for

Strong TypeScript and JavaScript on the server; comfortable owning API contracts end to end.

Production experience with React and Next.js (App Router familiarity is a plus).

Solid SQL and PostgreSQL; pragmatic approach to performance and correctness.

Experience running long-running processes (workers/cron-style jobs), not only request/response APIs.

Ability to work in Python for services or data/ML tooling when the problem fits.

Clear communication, async-friendly collaboration, and comfort debugging across services in a remote setting.

Nice to have

Auth patterns including OAuth and session/API security tradeoffs.

Experience with Docker / systemd-style multi-process layouts.

Exposure to ML workflows (training scripts, checkpoints, inference).

Background in high-volume or streaming data paths.

title: Sales & Production Coordinator – US Client Relations (Neutral Accent Required)
description:
Company: STX Promo | 
 



Location: Remote (Philippines-based) 



Work Hours: Full-Time, U.S. Day Shift (Philippine Overnight) + Light weekend inbox rotation 



Pay Range: $1,100–$1,500/month (Includes premium pay for U.S. hours / Night Shift. Starting rate depends on experience). 



Perks & Benefits: Paid Time Off (PTO), observed US Holidays, end-of-year/performance bonuses (13th-month), and massive room for long-term growth. (Adjust these to fit your exact offerings!)





About STX Promo & Our Growth



STX Promo helps businesses and organizations Step Up Their Setup with eye-catching custom canopies, table covers, flags, banners, and more. We work with small businesses, schools, and nonprofits across the U.S. to elevate their brand presence at events and trade shows.



We are growing incredibly fast. Over the last 10 months alone, we’ve added 4 people to our core team along with several specialized gig workers. As we gear up for our busiest season yet, our current Sales and Production Coordinator is handling a massive volume of orders. We are actively hiring a second full-time coordinator to jump into the trenches, split the workload, and help us maintain our pro-level communication and zero-hassle client experience.





About the Role: Your Impact



We need a highly organized, proactive Sales & Production Coordinator who specializes in Client and Vendor Relations and Process Optimization.



In this role, you are the crucial bridge between our U.S. clients, our internal design team, and our manufacturing suppliers.



Communication Split (80%
 / 20% Phone): While this role is heavily
-based (about 80% of your communication via Gmail and Live Chat), the other 20% will involve speaking directly with our U.S. clients and vendors over the phone. You must be able to confidently handle calls, troubleshoot issues, and provide a friendly, premium customer experience. Because of this, flawless spoken English and a clear, neutral accent are absolute requirements.





Key Responsibilities:



Workflow Optimization: Actively analyze and improve our backend processes using ClickUp, Shopify, and Gmail.



Client Relations (80/20 Split): Manage daily incoming sales and customer service
s/chats, and confidently handle inbound phone inquiries with a friendly, US-facing tone.



Vendor Management: Place precise orders through supplier portals, track delivery times, and troubleshoot delays directly with vendors.



Production Coordination: Collaborate heavily with our Graphic Design team to confirm print graphics and prepare files for handoff.



Workflow Tracking: Organize project priorities using ClickUp. Maintain organized client files within Google Drive.



Schedule & Light Weekend Rotation: Work a consistent Monday–Friday U.S. daytime schedule. You will split a light weekend inbox rotation with our current coordinator (you will not work every weekend) to ensure clients aren't left hanging and deals are closed quickly.





? You're a Great Fit If You Have:



Top-Tier English & Neutral Accent: Extensive experience working directly with U.S.-based clients over voice/phone (US BPO/Call Center experience is a massive plus). You must possess a strong understanding of American business communication and have a clear, neutral accent.



Operational Mindset: You are a problem solver who naturally looks for ways to make systems run smoother.



Vendor/Client Experience: A solid background in managing supplier relationships and keeping clients happy.



Extreme Attention to Detail: You must be hyper-vigilant when approving graphics and placing orders.



Grace Under Pressure: You thrive in a fast-paced environment and keep your cool during the "busy season."



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully):



To ensure your application stands out, you MUST submit the following two items. Applications missing either of these will be immediately deleted.



A Voice Intro (REQUIRED): Please provide a link to a 1-to-2-minute voice recording (you can use a free tool like 
). 



Introduce yourself, highlight your experience dealing with US clients on the phone, and tell us why you are a great fit for this role. We use this to evaluate your spoken English and "phone voice," so please speak naturally and confidently!



Your updated Resume/CV.



We look forward to hearing your intro and finding the next crucial member of our growing team!

title: Video Editor (language education content)
description:
I am an Accent & Pronunciation Coach looking for a detail-oriented Video Editor to produce educational content, both short- and long-form. You will primarily be turning "talking head" footage into high-retention social media content, such as short form instagram content or long form video podcasts for YouTube.



Most of my content consists of "talking head" videos where I discuss linguistics, pronunciation, and the mindset behind language learning.



Core Responsibilities:



- Video editing: cutting out bloopers, minimal zooms to emphasize key points, and other typical social media cuts for audience retention.

- Audio: occasional sound effects to emphasize key points, audio cleanup if necessary

- Educational Overlays: Correcting auto-captions, placing diagrams or phonetic transcriptions and other text (I will provide this).



Requirements:



- English proficiency: I teach English pronunciation, so you need to be decent in English, especially since a lot of content revolves around foreign-accented English, your English needs to be good enough to understand other accents

- Communication with me: as it is likely I may need to correct overlaid text or diagrams, so we will need to be in contact a few times a week.

- File management: There will likely be a lot of files we are sharing, so make sure you name the files correctly and place them in the right folders.



How to apply:

Please link your portfolio of video editing work. Also start your message with “phonetics” so I know you’ve read this. If you have any experience with language teaching or the English language, please let me know about that too.





PLEASE NOTE:

I am a small one person company. I cannot afford to pay too much! I'm only looking for a PART-TIME video editor, a couple of videos a week max.

description:
We are an international fashion company, active across Asia, Europe, and the USA, focused on building a strong high-end fashion brand.



We are looking for a highly creative AI-driven textile and print designer with a strong understanding of high-end fashion.



This role focuses on the creation of fabrics, prints, textures, and embellished surfaces for our collections.



?



Your role:

 • Create original fabric designs (prints, textures, surfaces)

 • Develop embellishment concepts (beading, embroidery, sequins, placements)

 • Use AI tools to generate and refine high-fashion visuals

 • Translate ideas into collection-ready designs

 • Ensure strong and consistent brand identity across fabrics



?



Creative direction:



We are evolving towards a more provocative, bold and avant-garde aesthetic.



We expect:

 • Strong, modern, high-fashion visuals

 • A confident and creative approach

 • Non-standard thinking and original ideas

 • Ability to create desire, tension, and impact



This is not a basic design role. We are looking for someone who can push boundaries.



?



Requirements:

 • Experience in fashion textiles / fabric design / surface design

 • Strong understanding of prints and embellished fabrics

 • Advanced use of AI tools (Midjourney, DALL·E or similar)

 • Strong aesthetic sense aligned with high-end fashion

 • Ability to work independently and deliver structured output

title: Video Editor
description:
Job Description:

We are seeking a freelance video editor to create high-energy, attention-grabbing videos in the style of Alex Hormozi. This includes recurring projects, such as short, engaging videos with dynamic animations, bold captions, and sound effects. This role has the potential to grow into a part-time or full-time position as our project needs expand.



Responsibilities:

 • Edit footage to produce polished, high-energy videos with animations, bold text captions, and seamless transitions.

 • Incorporate Alex Hormozi-inspired elements like fast cuts, punchy sound effects, and engaging motion graphics.

 • Collaborate on multiple projects with consistent timelines.

 • Ensure creativity, brand alignment, and content tailored to specific platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



Qualifications:

 • Proficiency in Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools.

 • Portfolio showcasing Alex Hormozi-style or similar high-energy short-form content.

 • Strong skills in motion graphics, text animation, and sound design.

 • Interest in scaling with a growing team and creating impactful content.



How to Apply:



Please Follow Link to Apply -----> 
/MGRVAapplication

Attach link to your portfolio

title: Graphic Designer who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description: We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Graphic Designer’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via email. The job responsibilities include designing and creating engaging YouTube thumbnails, researching trending thumbnail styles, editing and enhancing images, organizing and maintaining a thumbnail archive, analyzing thumbnail performance, collaborating with the content team, ensuring brand consistency, and assisting with basic design tasks. Additionally, creativity, attention to detail, and collaboration skills are key to creating thumbnails that align with the brand and content strategy. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via email. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe

title: World's Greatest VA for the World's Greatest Salsa School
description:
We are Toronto Dance Salsa, Canada’s largest Salsa dance school. Our vision is to solve the world’s greatest problem: lonliness. For over 10 years, we’ve been building a community where people feel they belong. We believe in creating a tribe you choose, not just the family you’re born into. Do you want to help make this vision real? If you’re eagre to do purposeful work and grow both professionally and personally, you may have found your new HOME. This isn’t just a job, it’s an opportunity to learn how to make an impact. In your application, please put “I am your next awesome Virtual Assistant!” in the subject line. The job responsibilities include administrative and techincal support, answering
s from students and making them feel welcomed, managing logistics and staying organized, and being proactive in improving role efficiency and suggesting business improvements. The ideal candidate is detail oriented, has excellent English skills, technical proficiency, customer support experience, and reliable equipment. Please also include the link to your resume, your hourly salary expectations, your ideal work schedule, and in the first line of your message list any spelling or grammatical errors you found in this job post. We have to change one of our weekly classes, so please calculate the new Sunday schedule for a 6 week course by moving the start date later by 3 weeks. Current 2024 schedule: June 9 to July 21, with no class on June 30. Rules: we do not run classes on Ontario statutory holidays, and if a holiday lands on a Friday or Monday, we take that whole weekend off. In your application, include the full list of the 6 new Sunday class dates in order, and please watch this Loom video: 
 
 job is full time (40 hours per week) with the opportunity to transition into a long term role, would start immediately, and is ongoing. We would start with a small project first, and we’d pay you for your ideas and research. Be part of a team that’s changing people’s lives. Thank you for considering joining our mission to solve lonliness. We look forward to possibly having you feel like you belong at our school as well. Please submit your job application only via OnlineJobs.ph. Do not send your application message. Irish #Belong

title: Senior Fashion Designer (High-End / Embellished Collections)
description:
We are an international fashion company, active across Asia, Europe, and the USA, building a strong high-end fashion brand.



We are looking for a true fashion designer.

Someone with vision, structure, and the ability to execute at the highest level.



This role focuses on the development of high-end, embellished collections, from concept to production.



?



Your role:

 • Design complete collections (not isolated pieces)

 • Develop strong silhouettes, cuts, and proportions

 • Create and direct embellished pieces (beading, embroidery, textures)

 • Define and maintain a consistent creative direction

 • Build full technical packs / technical sheets (measurements, construction, details)

 • Select and develop color palettes and fabric combinations

 • Ensure designs are production-ready and coherent as a collection

 • Work closely with production to bring designs to life



?



Creative direction:



High-end. Bold. Provocative.

Very fashion-forward.



We are not looking for safe design.

We are looking for identity, precision, and impact.



?



Who you are:

 • You see yourself as a fashion designer, not just a technician

 • You can design and structure an entire collection

 • You have a strong sense of color, balance, and composition

 • You understand embellishments, fabrics, and detailing

 • You combine creativity with technical accuracy

 • You think in terms of collections, not individual pieces



?



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in fashion design (preferably women’s high-end fashion)

 • Strong portfolio with high-end / embellished work

 • Ability to create technical packs (tech packs)

 • Strong knowledge of construction, fabrics, and finishing

 • Good understanding of color development and fabric selection

 • Ability to deliver structured and consistent work

title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 350 – 500 per hour

Employment Type: Part-time

Required Experience: 1-2 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



What You'll Do



As a Video Editor, you will help create engaging video content used for advertising, marketing, and social media campaigns.

Your responsibilities may include:

• Editing raw footage into engaging short-form videos

• Adding captions, transitions, music, and basic graphics

• Repurposing long-form videos into shorter clips for social media

• Optimizing videos for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

• Collaborating with the marketing team to produce content for campaigns

• Organizing video assets and maintaining editing files



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for someone who has basic to intermediate video editing skills and is passionate about creating engaging digital content.



You should have experience or knowledge in:

• Video editing using tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar software

• Editing short-form videos for social media

• Adding captions, simple motion graphics, and transitions

• Understanding pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Optimizing videos for social media formats and platforms

• Basic audio editing and background music integration



You do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable learning new editing techniques and improving your skills.



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



• A recent graduate or early-career creative professional

• Has 1–2 years of experience in video editing or content creation

• Creative and has a good eye for storytelling and visuals

• Familiar with social media video trends

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Able to work remotely and meet deadlines

• Interested in building a long-term career in digital content and marketing



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital



• Fully remote work setup

• Competitive hourly pay

• Opportunity to work on real marketing campaigns

• Build a strong video editing portfolio

• Work with a growing digital marketing team



If you're passionate about video editing, digital content, and creative storytelling, we would love to hear from you.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Commission-Based Sales Agent — EdTech (Private Schools)
description:
About The Math Wiz



The Math Wiz (
) is an online math learning platform for Filipino elementary students (Grades 1–6). Built on Singapore Math methodology and fully aligned to the DepEd MATATAG curriculum, it gives schools a turnkey digital math program — video lessons, interactive quizzes with full solutions, and self-paced learning on any device.





The Role



You will approach private elementary schools in your city and pitch The Math Wiz as a school-wide annual subscription. Schools bundle the subscription into their student fees and earn a margin — so you're not asking schools to spend money, you're showing them a new revenue line.



This is a field sales role. You'll visit schools, meet principals and academic coordinators, and walk them through how the platform works. We provide all materials — a school-facing booklet, pitch scripts, phone scripts, and a step-by-step sales playbook.





Commission Structure



Year 1: 70% of collected revenue from every school you sign

Year 2 onwards: 10% perpetual renewal commission for every year that school stays subscribed



This is not a one-time payout. Every school you close becomes a recurring income stream. Sign 5 schools and you have passive renewal income coming in every year with no additional work.





How Your Commission Is Protected



You won't be pitching one school at a time. You'll be working a pipeline of multiple schools simultaneously, each at a different stage of the sales process. By the time your first school signs, you'll have several others already warmed up and in progress.



This means our incentives are fully aligned. If we don't pay your commission on school #1, you walk — and we lose every other school you've been building relationships with. The cost of not paying you far outweighs the cost of paying you. Your pipeline is your leverage.



On top of that, all commission terms are documented in a formal Sales Agent Agreement before you start.





Example Earnings



One school with 200 students at ?800/student/year = ?160,000 collected

Your Year 1 commission = ?112,000

Your renewal commission every year after = ?16,000

Scale that to 5 schools and the numbers speak for themselves.





Requirements



Based in Metro Manila, Cebu City, or Davao City

Sales experience (field sales, B2B, or direct selling preferred)

Confident approaching schools and speaking with principals and administrators

Can work independently and manage your own schedule

Has own transportation for school visits

Fluent in Filipino and English





What We Provide



Professional school-facing booklet and sales agent booklet

Phone scripts and in-person pitch scripts

Step-by-step sales playbook with a proven multi-touch approach

Ongoing support and coordination from the founder directly





How to Apply



Apply through this listing. Tell us which city you're based in and briefly describe your sales experience. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short Zoom call to walk through the opportunity in detail.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Flexible Hours, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Real Estate Conveyancing Compliance Officer
description:
PropZap — Help Build the Compliance Backbone of a Company Scaling Across North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We’re not building just another brokerage.



We’re building a modern real estate company powered by strong systems, disciplined operations, intelligent workflows, and long-term vision.



Every real estate transaction carries legal, financial, and regulatory responsibility.



Behind every successful closing is a file that is complete, organized, and defensible.



As we scale, maintaining that level of operational integrity becomes even more important.



That’s why we’re looking for someone who takes pride in building order, protecting compliance, and ensuring every transaction file stands up to scrutiny.



This role helps protect the integrity of the entire brokerage.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Conveyancing Compliance Officer

Location: Remote

Role Type: Full-Time / Long-Term

Compensation: 50,000 PHP+ (Negotiable)



We believe exceptional operators deserve exceptional compensation. As PropZap grows, we are willing to pay premium for people who consistently deliver high-quality work, protect compliance standards, and help strengthen the systems that allow the company to scale confidently.



Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is Important



Every real estate transaction produces a complex set of documents, approvals, and compliance requirements.



If those records are incomplete, inconsistent, or poorly documented, the brokerage is exposed to unnecessary risk.



This role ensures our transaction files are clean, complete, and defensible from acceptance through closing — particularly during the critical firm-to-close conveyancing phase.



You will also support brokerage compliance operations by ensuring documentation standards are followed and potential risks are identified early.



This role sits at the center of:



• Conveyancing readiness

• Compliance oversight

• Documentation integrity

• Operational coordination



If you enjoy bringing clarity and structure to complex documentation, this role will feel meaningful and impactful.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities



Transaction File Compliance Review



You will review buyer and seller transaction files to ensure they are complete, accurate, and audit-ready.



This includes:



• Reviewing transaction files in SkySlope (system of record)

• Ensuring required documents are present

• Confirming documents are legible and properly executed

• Verifying files are named and stored correctly

• Ensuring amendments, waivers, and supporting documents match the executed contract set

• Checking deposits, dates, and contract details for consistency



Your goal is to ensure each file clearly reflects what occurred during the transaction and maintains a clean documentation trail.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Pre-Close Conveyancing Readiness



You will conduct pre-close readiness checks to ensure files are properly prepared before entering the final stages of conveyancing.



This includes:



• Identifying missing or inconsistent documents early

• Creating clear lists of outstanding items and responsible parties

• Re-checking files once corrections are submitted

• Monitoring for late-stage issues such as:

Missing signatures

Name mismatches

Missing waivers

Incomplete deposit documentation

Missing lawyer details

Conflicting dates



Your work helps prevent last-minute issues that could delay closing.



--------------------------------------------------------------



FINTRAC Oversight (AML / Client Identification)



You will enforce PropZap’s FINTRAC standards with a strict compliance approach.



Responsibilities include:



• Verifying identification requirements for all parties

• Confirming ID documents are clear and valid

• Ensuring names on ID match contract names exactly

• Confirming required information such as occupation and employer

• Ensuring FINTRAC references are properly recorded internally



You will also manage complex cases such as:



• Corporate parties

• Foreign buyers or sellers

• Name discrepancies

• Missing or unclear identification

• Time-sensitive transactions



Any suspicious or high-risk information must be escalated promptly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



External Law Office Coordination (When Required)



You may assist with coordination related to the conveyancing phase, including:



• Confirming lawyer contact information is recorded correctly

• Ensuring the correct contract set is available for closing

• Verifying key transaction information is consistent

• Assisting internal teams in resolving missing documentation requested by lawyers



Exact interaction with law offices may vary depending on internal workflow.



--------------------------------------------------------------



MLS & Listing Compliance (When Applicable)



You may also assist with brokerage compliance checks related to listings and marketing documentation.



This may include:



• Confirming listing documentation is properly stored

• Reviewing listing records for completeness

• Supporting brokerage documentation standards tied to listings

• Identifying potential compliance issues related to listing or marketing records



The scope of MLS or advertising compliance responsibilities may evolve as the brokerage grows.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Documentation Standards & File Hygiene



At PropZap, documentation matters.



If something affects:



• money

• deadlines

• conditions

• approvals

• compliance obligations



…it must be clearly documented in the system of record.



You will:



• Provide clear feedback when documentation standards are not met

• Request corrections when necessary

• Follow up to ensure gaps are resolved



Clean files allow teams to understand transaction status and risk quickly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Escalations & Risk Monitoring



You will identify scenarios that require escalation, including:



• Missing FINTRAC documentation

• Money or trust-related ambiguity

• Potential misrepresentation or conflicting information

• Situations requiring legal interpretation

• Clients threatening complaints or legal action



Escalations should include a clear summary of the issue and supporting documentation.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Compliance Audits & Quality Assurance



You may periodically review files to maintain compliance standards.



This may include:



• Performing internal file audits

• Identifying recurring documentation issues

• Monitoring patterns of missing information

• Flagging operational risks early



These reviews help keep the brokerage compliant and defensible.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Process Improvement



You will also help strengthen operational systems by identifying patterns and inefficiencies.



This includes:



• Tracking recurring compliance gaps

• Suggesting improvements to checklists and templates

• Supporting updates to internal SOPs

• Helping teams maintain consistent documentation standards



Your insights help the company improve how transactions are handled as we scale.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who This Role Is Great For



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, detail, and keeping complex documentation organized.



Strong candidates often have experience in:



• Real estate conveyancing

• Transaction coordination

• Brokerage compliance

• Legal or documentation-heavy administrative roles



Key strengths include:



• Exceptional attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills

• Clear written communication

• Comfort working with sensitive personal information

• Good judgment when escalating regulated issues



--------------------------------------------------------------



Tools & Systems



You will primarily work with:



• SkySlope (transaction file system)

• Slack (internal communication)

• Notion (Task tracking, SOPs and documentation)



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Long-term role inside a growing real estate platform

• Direct collaboration with operations and brokerage leadership

• Opportunity to strengthen systems that support company growth

• A role where your work protects the integrity of real estate transactions



As the company expands across markets, the importance of strong compliance and documentation systems grows — and the people who build those systems grow with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume

• Portfolio (if applicable — examples of conveyancing, compliance, or documentation work)

• Summary of relevant conveyancing or compliance experience

• Expected monthly compensation

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result (if available)

• Intro video (optional but strongly preferred)



Subject Line: Conveyancing Compliance Officer – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------



If you want to help build the compliance backbone of a real estate platform that is scaling across North America — and grow with a company that values operational excellence — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Website Copywriter
description:
I own a small digital marketing agency in the United States and am looking for a copywriter.  We work with mainly home service businesses and help them grow through better websites, ads, SEO and direct mail.  We’re looking for a copywriter who can write high-converting homepage and service page content.  You will work alongside an SEO manager and a website developer.  We're a cool agency to work with and have a strong team of A+ players.  Many of our contractors have been with us for a very long time.



We're looking for someone who can create strong, clear, persuasive writing and who can leverage AI to be more efficient but where the final output will pass AI detection tests.  We're looking for near-native English writing skills with impeccable grammar and style.



This role is part time and will be on an as-needed basis.



Please provide the following:



1. Examples of your work, ideally referencing websites where you have created the copy.  If you provide examples of websites please specify which content on the website you wrote.



2. Do you have any experience writing for the home services (landscaping, roofing, remodeling) niche? If so can you provide some examples?  This isn't required but will be helpful.



3. What would you charge for an 800 word service page?  Do you charge by hour or by the word?



4. How are you using AI in your process (please be detailed here) and how are you making it not sound like it was written by AI?



5. What is your typical turnaround time?



6. Are you currently employed? Or are you just doing freelancing work?



Please only respond through OnlineJobs.ph, not through other channels.  Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you.

Schedule Pattern B

Schedule Pattern C

title: Cold Calling Executive – Short-Term Rentals (London)
description:
Location: Remote



Job Type: Part-Time



About Us:



We are a rapidly growing short-term rental company operating across London, providing high-quality, fully managed accommodation to business travelers, tourists, and relocators. As part of our expansion, we're looking for a motivated and persuasive Cold Calling Executive to help us grow our property portfolio by contacting landlords and letting agents directly.



Job Summary:



As a Cold Calling Executive, your primary responsibility will be to initiate contact with property owners and letting agents across London. Your goal is to introduce our services, build rapport, and schedule viewings.



Key Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls to landlords and letting agents from provided lists or through your own research.

Pitch the company’s short-term rental management services in a compelling and professional manner.

Handle objections and questions confidently and knowledgeably.

Identify qualified leads and schedule viewings

Maintain accurate records of calls, leads, and conversations using our spreadsheet.

Continuously improve pitch based on feedback



Requirements:



Previous experience in cold calling - can speak confidently on the phone

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Strong negotiation and persuasion skills.

Confident, self-motivated, and resilient personality.

Good knowledge of the London property market is a plus.

Ability to work independently and hit performance targets.



What We Offer:



Base pay

Flexible working hours.

Training and scripts provided.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving and ambitious company.



How to Apply:



Please submit your CV along with a short cover letter outlining your experience with cold calling and why you're a good fit for this role

title: AI Video Creator for Viral Dog Content (Ongoing Work)
description:
We are a fun, growing HVAC company in San Diego creating short, funny AI videos featuring talking dogs (Chili & Diesel).

We are looking for a long-term video creator/editor to help us produce 20–30 second videos for:

• Instagram Reels 

• TikTok 

• YouTube Shorts 

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing:

• Recreate short-form videos similar to our existing sample: 

        (we already have 3 verticals on our Higgsfield account)

• Use AI tools to animate dog avatars (lip sync + voice) 

• Add backgrounds, light motion, captions, and music 

• Edit videos in a fun, engaging, viral style 

• Upload finished videos to our social media platforms 

________________________________________

What We Provide:

• Scripts (short, funny, conversational) 

• Voice direction (or pre-generated audio if needed) 

• Hashtags and captions 

• Example videos to match style 

________________________________________

Tools (Open to Your Recommendation):

We are currently using Higgsfield, but open to better/faster solutions such as:

• HeyGen 

• CapCut 

• ElevenLabs 

• Runway / other AI tools 

Please tell us what YOU recommend for speed and quality.

________________________________________

Pay:

• $20–$40 per video depending on complexity 

• Ongoing work (8-10 videos per month) 

• Potential for long-term position 

________________________________________

Important:

Our current videos may be slightly complex.

We are OPEN to simplifying the production process if you can suggest a faster, scalable method while maintaining a similar fun style.

________________________________________

To Apply:

Please include:

1. Examples of similar AI or short-form videos you’ve created 

2. What tools you would use for this project 

3. Estimated time per video 

4. Your favorite type of viral content to create 

    Bonus if you love dogs!



BEST CASE SCENARIO (what we’re aiming for)

• Can produce videos in 1–2 hours 

• Uses templates 

• Suggests simplifications 

We are also interested in batching production (creating multiple videos at once for efficiency.

title: SMS Campaign Specialist (Real Estate )
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: SMS Campaign Specialist

Location: Remote (Must work EST hours)

Job Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hours/week

Start Date: Immediate (within the next 7 days)



About Us:



We’re a growing real estate investment company focused on off-market deals. Our acquisition team works directly with motivated sellers, and SMS outreach is a core channel for generating leads.



This is not a general VA role. We’re hiring ONLY experienced SMS specialists. If SMS was just 20% of your last job, this position is not for you.



Who We’re Looking For:



– You’ve managed daily SMS outreach as your main job — not just as a side task

– You’ve worked with tools like Launch Control, GoHighLevel, Smarter Contact, etc.

– You understand deliverability, compliance, opt-out logic, and spam filters

– You know how to tag leads, track replies, and move qualified prospects into CRM

– You’re not using a phone — you’ve used professional platforms and tools

– You can handle 1,500+ outbound texts/day and rotate templates properly

– You’re available full-time (45 hrs/week), working EST hours



Key Responsibilities:



– Run high-volume SMS campaigns daily using proper systems

– Monitor responses and qualify leads based on script and criteria

– Manage templates and rotate messages to avoid filtering

– Tag leads accurately and track campaign metrics

– Coordinate with acquisition and data teams to align campaigns



Required Experience:



– Minimum 1 year managing SMS outreach full-time

– Real estate investment or wholesaling background is a major plus

– Strong written English — clear, professional, and natural tone

– Familiarity with CRMs and SMS platforms

– Must be organized, reliable, and fully independent



How to Apply:



We only review serious applications from experienced SMS specialists.

Incomplete applications or generic submissions will not be reviewed.

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:


/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy



Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

title: AI Automation Virtual Assistant (White Label Resalable Solutions)
description:
AI Automation Virtual Assistant (White Label Resalable Solutions)

We’re seeking a highly skilled AI Automation Virtual Assistant who specializes in building resalable, white label automation solutions using Zapier, 
, and GoHighLevel (GHL). This role requires hands on experience creating real automation systems—not just theoretical knowledge—and the ability to provide examples of past workflow builds, templates, or automation assets.

You will be responsible for designing scalable automations, developing reusable templates, and setting up end to end systems that can be packaged and resold to clients.

Key Responsibilities

AI Automation & Workflow Development

•	Build reusable and white label automation templates using Zapier, 
, or GHL

•	Create end to end workflow automations for lead management, client onboarding, notifications, CRM tasks, and business operations

•	Develop AI assisted workflows combining LLMs, APIs, and CRM actions

•	Build custom automation systems for data capture, lead routing, task creation, user segmentation, and reporting

•	Optimize and refine existing automations for reliability, speed, and scale

•	Document workflow structure so templates can be resold and used by multiple clients

Chatbot & AI System Creation

•	Build reusable chatbot flows for GHL

•	Set up AI powered assistants for customer support, lead qualification, onboarding, and FAQs

•	Create white label chatbot templates that agencies can resell

•	Integrate chatbot actions with Zapier, 
, or GHL automations

Integration & System Setup

•	Connect CRMs, forms, landing pages, booking tools, and databases using automation platforms

•	Create standardized integrations clients can plug into (e.g., CRM setup packs, onboarding systems, lead nurture flows)

•	Build API based automations where no native integration exists

•	Maintain clean, well documented workflows ready for duplication and resale

Required Skills & Experience

•	Proven experience building automations in Zapier, 
, or GHL

•	Ability to provide screenshots, workflow maps, or examples of past automation work

•	Experience creating white label or resalable automation templates

•	Strong understanding of automation logic, triggers, branching, and error handling

•	Ability to turn business processes into streamlined, automated systems

•	Strong documentation and communication skills

Nice to Have

•	Experience with chatbot builders

•	Familiarity with AI content or AI agent tools

•	Ability to create simple process diagrams or SOPs

•	Basic design skills for template presentation (optional)

To Apply

Please include examples of your automation work, such as:

•	Screenshots of Zapier, Make, or GHL workflows

•	Reusable templates you've built

•	Examples of white label or resalable automations

•	Workflow maps, documentation, or links to past projects

title: Controller
description:
Introduction:

We are a fast growing e-commerce business. We have a strong fan base and customer base. We provide top quality products and top tier customer service. As our controller, your role is a hybrid between accounting, building systems/SOPs and operations. 



Responsibilities:

Invoicing wholesalers, tracking payments

Updating wholesalers sheet, modified orders sheet

Booking expenses and receipt management

Tracking revenue and COGS by product

Monthly close and reconciliations

Generating and reviewing financial reports

Building a treasury system



Operating tasks:

Inventory tracking

Ad hoc operational tasks



Requirements:



CPA required. In-depth understanding and experience (1-3 years) with Shopify, QuickBooks, Google Drive, Google Sheet



Excellent English communication. C2 Mastery required. 



The requirement for English is very high for this role, you need to be very fluent in English



You will be on a screenshare with the team for your shift every time. You will be coming to the “office” to work virtually



The shift is from 9:30pm - 5:30am local Philippines time. It is required that you are already on this night shift schedule for at least 6 months with a previous employer



How To Apply:



For the subject line of your application, please do the following steps:

Go to our
 page 
 and find our website. Visit the website and find the t-shirt for sale which has a picture of Alex Pagulayan on it. The words written on the t-shirt + the word Bookkeeper will be your ‘subject line’ to write.



Attach your Portfolio



Answer these to questions:

Are you ok with being on a screenshare during your entire shift every time?

How long did you work on this night shift schedule previously? What was the schedule?



Create a one-minute video on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Upload it to Google Drive and provide the link

title: High-Paying Instagram DM Setter (Experienced Only | US Hours | Remote)
description:

As our DM Setter, you’ll be responsible for managing Instagram conversations, engaging leads, and qualifying prospects for our offers. You’ll play a key role in driving revenue by booking high-quality calls.  



Requirements:

- Native English speaker (clear, natural communication)

- Willing to work US hours

- At least 1 year of experience DM setting

- Strong understanding of sales psychology and objection handling

- Ability to manage high-volume conversations without losing quality

- Organized, reliable, and results-driven



Responsibilities

- Respond to inbound and outbound Instagra
ssages

- Build rapport and qualify leads effectively

- Guide prospects toward booking calls

- Maintain organized tracking of conversations and leads

- Collaborate with the team to improve scripts and performance



Perks:

*Well-paid position (above market for the right candidate)

*You can work as much as you want. I will pay you a salary, but if you work extra hours, you will get paid.

*Flexible Vacation, if you need time off, just let me know.

*Opportunity to advance/get bonuses. If you do a good job, I will give you a raise and bonuses.



About Me:

I own two companies B Dancewear and Effective Ecommerce and am a partner to multiple e-commerce businesses. I have been working with Virtual Assistants for over 6 years and all of my VAs have been very happy to work with me. You will be given a chance to talk with my current VA before you are hired.



To Apply for the job:

 here]”

2. Write 2-3 sentences on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Do not write more than that, or else your application will be deleted.

3. Number of years as a DM setter



Make sure to follow all the steps above. This is a great job opportunity with the ability to get bonuses and raises, so I will only look at applicants who really want the job. If I interview you, there will be a short call between us, and a video will be required



Do not write more than what I have asked you above. If you write more than what is requested above, I will ignore your job post.



Thank you,  

Travis Marziani

title: Social Media & Operations Assistant
description:
Starlight Marketing is looking for a dependable Social Media & Operations Assistant to support both our content workflow and internal operations. This role combines social media execution with behind-the-scenes coordination to help keep campaigns, accounts, and daily systems running smoothly.



This position suits someone who is organized, digitally confident, and comfortable handling structured tasks alongside creative support.



Social Media Responsibilities:

1. Prepare and publish content across assigned social platforms

2.Format captions, hashtags, and basic creatives provided by the team

3.Monitor comments, inboxes, and notifications and flag important messages

4.Assist with content calendars and ensure posts go out as scheduled

5.Collect basic performance data (reach, engagement, views) for reporting

6.Repurpose existing content into short clips or simple visual formats



What We’re Looking For:

-Clear written English and professional online communication

-Comfortable working with social platforms, Google Workspace, and task tools

-Strong attention to detail and ability to follow systems

-Reliable, responsive, and able to manage time independently

-Willingness to learn and adapt as responsibilities evolve



This is a long-term role with room to grow as Starlight Marketing expands.



If you’re someone who enjoys keeping things organized while supporting social media execution, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Appointment Setter / Outreach VA for HVAC Owner Interviews
description:
We are looking for a reliable, professional Outreach VA / Appointment Setter to help us book interviews with HVAC business owners in the United States.



This is not a closing role.

You will not be responsible for selling a product or handling advanced sales conversations.



Your job is to:



contact HVAC business owners using our script

follow up professionally

book qualified interviews on the founder’s calendar

keep notes and tracking updated



We will provide:



the exact script

the target market

the messaging

the qualification rules

the booking process



Your role is to execute consistently, communicate clearly, and help us schedule qualified conversations.



Responsibilities



Reach out to HVAC business owners using our script

Follow up with prospects professionally and consistently

Book qualified interviews on the calendar

Keep simple notes and tracking updated

Flag strong prospects and common objections

Follow instructions closely and stay organized



Requirements



Strong written and spoken English

Experience with outreach, appointment setting, lead generation, or VA work

Comfortable communicating with U.S. business owners

Organized, dependable, and coachable

Able to follow a script and process without going off-track

Professional, polite, and persistent without being pushy



Bonus If You Have



Experience contacting U.S. small business owners

Experience with service businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, roofing, or home services

Experience using Google Sheets, Calendly, CRMs, or outreach tools



Compensation

This is a performance-based role. Compensation is tied to completed qualified interviews. Strong performers will have the opportunity to earn more based on results.



How to Apply

Please send:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with outreach or appointment setting

The types of businesses you have contacted before

A short voice recording introducing yourself in English

The phrase: Qualified conversations beat busy work



Also answer this question:

How would you follow up with a busy business owner who did not reply to your first message?

title: Real Estate Sales & Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
We are hiring a high-performance Real Estate Virtual Assistant focused on outbound prospecting, CRM management, and operational support.



This role is:



  40% Outbound Calling & Follow-Up 

  40% Admin & CRM Management

  20% Financial & Operational Coordination



This is a performance-based role with bonuses tied directly to appointments and closed transactions.



Core Responsibilities

1- Outbound Calling & Lead Generation (40%)

  100 calls per day (FSBO, expired listings, geographic farming, database follow-up)

  Qualify seller motivation

  Identify warm leads

  Book listing appointments

  Log detailed call notes in Follow Up Boss

  Maintain pipeline integrity



Weekly Targets:

  5 warm leads

  Minimum 1 qualified appointment



Tools:

  Mojo Dialer

  Follow Up Boss CRM



2- Admin & CRM Management (40%)

  Calendar & inbox management

  Follow-up scheduling

  Database tagging & cleanup

  Digital signature coordination

  Transaction checklist management

  Maintain zero CRM backlog

  Success Metric:

  No missed follow-ups

  Clean and organized CRM at all times





3- Financial & Operations Support (20%)

  Categorizing transactions in QuickBooks Online

  Monthly reconciliation

  Tracking rental/property performance

  Preparing simple cash flow & P&L summaries

  KPIs & Performance Metrics



Daily

  100+ outbound calls

  All notes logged in CRM



Weekly

  5 warm leads

  1 qualified appointment



Monthly

  Financial reconciliation complete

  CRM fully updated

  Bonus review



Compensation

  $5/hour base

  $25 per qualified appointment set

  $300 per closed transaction



Top performers can substantially increase income through performance bonuses.





Ideal Candidate:



Excellent spoken English

Comfortable with cold calling and objection handling

Extremely organized and detail-oriented

CRM disciplined

Familiar with QuickBooks Online

Self-directed with minimal supervision





You will be ahead if you submit a voice recording about yourself and role play: 





Submit a short video (or audio if more comfortable) assessment (2 to 5 minutes max) . 

Please record yourself answering the following: 

1- Introduce yourself and describe your cold calling experience. 

2- Roleplay this situation:

 You are calling a homeowner in one of these three scenarios (chose one):

-Homeowner whose listing expired

-Homeowner in Manhattan Beach that lived there since 1965

-Executor of a testate real estate (owner passed away, calling heirs)



Introduce yourself as working for Shoreview Partners, Real Estate brokerage out of Manhattan Beach. Your goal is to qualify them as potential clients, and ultimately set an appointment to walk the property an provide some value (apprise estimate, upgrades, off market sale...)



 They say: 

"We're not interested. We're just going to wait before selling again."  



Respond naturally as if on the phone. 





3- Tell us what success in this role would look like for you in 12 months, and how many cold calls have you made in a single day before?



Please submit your video or audio via Google Drive link here
