title: Auto Body Parts Sourcing & Collision Repair Coordinator (Remote - Night Shift)
description:
?TYPE OF WORK: Full Time (40 hours/week)

WAGE / SALARY: $2.00 - $2.50 USD per hour

SCHEDULE: Strictly 6:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

?About Us:

We operate a high-volume auto body and collision repair shop based in Canada. We rely on smart systems, quick communication, and a highly organized remote team to keep our shop floor moving without delays. If you know your way around collision parts, love hunting for the best deals, and can coordinate smoothly with a live shop floor, we want you on our team.

?The Role:

We are looking for an Auto Body Parts Sourcing & Repair Coordinator to act as the digital bridge between our estimators, our parts vendors, and our shop floor. You will be responsible for sourcing OEM, Aftermarket, and used collision parts, gathering quotes, and organizing repair schedules. You must have genuine knowledge of auto body anatomy—this is not a generic admin role.

?Key Responsibilities:

?Collision Parts Sourcing & Quoting: Use
 to request and organize quotes from official parts vendors for OEM and Aftermarket parts (bumpers, fenders, hoods, lighting, etc.).

?Used Parts Hunting: Aggressively search platforms like
 Marketplace, Kijiji, and eBay to find the best quality and cheapest used/recycled auto body parts to maximize our repair margins.

?Software Navigation: Use the Mitchell estimating system to look up specific collision parts, check repair times, and review technical repair procedures.

?Shop Coordination: Arrange and schedule cars for repair. You will use WhatsApp, internet phone (VoIP), and text/SMS to call into the shop and coordinate directly with the estimators and technicians on the floor.

?Administrative Management: Keep all parts orders, delivery ETAs, and repair schedules highly organized using Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive).

?Requirements:

?Auto Body Knowledge (Mandatory): You must know collision parts. You need to know the difference between a fender and a quarter panel, a radiator and a condenser, and understand basic collision terminology without having to Google it every time.

?Platform Experience: Familiarity with automotive estimating/repair software like Mitchell (Mitchell Cloud Estimating / Mitchell Connect) is required.

?Sourcing Savvy: You must know how to navigate online marketplaces (eBay, FB Marketplace, Kijiji) to find specific, compatible used auto body parts.

?Communication Skills: Excellent written and spoken English. You will be calling the shop, texting updates, and
ing vendors daily.

?Schedule Match: You must be available to work strictly from 6:00 PM to 2:00 AM PHT to align with our Canadian shop hours.

?Tech Setup: You must have a quiet workspace, a fast computer, a reliable internet connection, and a noise-canceling headset for clear VoIP calls.

title: AI Engineer
description:
AI Engineer – Autonomous Business Platform



Location:** Remote / Online From Home

Type: Full-Time



---



## **About Us**



We are building the next-generation AI platform that empowers entrepreneurs to launch, operate, and scale businesses almost entirely autonomously. Think Polsia AI meets AWS for entrepreneurship: AI agents handle everything from marketing, lead generation, cold outreach, campaigns, content creation, sales calls, client onboarding, and operations — all orchestrated seamlessly in a multi-agent ecosystem.



Our mission is to reduce the gap between having a business idea and running a fully operational company to **hours, not months**, while delivering measurable results for clients.



---



## **Role Overview**



We are seeking an experienced **AI Engineer** to architect, develop, and optimize our multi-agent autonomous platform. You will work across AI, automation, and workflow orchestration to bring our vision of a fully autonomous business-as-a-service platform to life.



You will help design AI agents that handle complex tasks, from prospecting to sales calls, campaign execution, reporting, and scaling — across industries. You will also implement memory systems, knowledge sharing, and learning loops to ensure continuous improvement of AI-driven workflows.



---



## **Key Responsibilities**



* Design, implement, and maintain **multi-agent AI workflows** that automate full business operations.

* Build AI agents for **lead generation, cold
 outreach, multi-channel campaigns, AI voice/video calls, client onboarding, reporting, and campaign optimization**.

* Integrate AI with **external APIs and services** (Webflow, WordPress, HubSpot, Calendly, Google Workspace, Twilio, Zapier, Stripe, QuickBooks, social media platforms, etc.).

* Develop a **centralized AI knowledge base** and memory system to maintain consistency and personalization across agents and clients.

* Implement **hyper-personalized, multi-channel acquisition strategies**, allowing AI to adapt based on lead engagement and client results.

* Ensure AI agents maintain **legal and compliance standards** (GDPR, CAN-SPAM, DNC).

* Optimize workflows to **scale across industries**, enabling rapid onboarding of new clients with minimal human intervention.

* Create **learning loops** for AI agents to improve scripts, content, campaigns, and outreach strategies continuously.

* Collaborate with frontend, backend, and product teams to provide a **seamless UX for entrepreneurs**, enabling dashboard management, reporting, and strategy oversight.

* Monitor AI performance, identify bottlenecks, and propose new automation strategies to **increase efficiency and impact**.



---



## **Required Skills & Experience**



* 3+ years of experience in **AI/ML engineering**, NLP, or conversational AI.

* Strong experience with **OpenAI GPT, Claude, or similar large language models**.

* Experience with **multi-agent systems** (AutoGPT, LangChain, custom orchestrations).

* Proficiency in Python, Node.js, or similar for **API integration and workflow automation**.

* Experience with **vector databases** (Pinecone, Weaviate) and memory systems for AI knowledge sharing.

* Understanding of **CRM systems, marketing automation, campaign management**, and lead generation workflows.

* Experience building **autonomous AI agents** that interact with external services and perform real-time decision-making.

* Strong understanding of *
 deliverability, domain reputation management, and multi-channel marketing compliance**.

* Familiarity with **cloud infrastructure, scaling AI services, and serverless architectures**.

* Excellent problem-solving skills, self-motivation, and ability to thrive in a fast-paced startup environment.



---



## **Preferred Skills**



* Experience with **TTS/STT technologies** (ElevenLabs, Whisper) and AI video avatars (Synthesia, DID).

* Experience designing AI for **B2B and B2C workflows**.

* Knowledge of **Zapier, n8n, or similar automation platforms** for integrating AI workflows.

* Experience with **data visualization and reporting tools** (Looker Studio, Tableau, Google Data Studio).



---



## **What You’ll Build**



* AI agents that fully automate **marketing, sales, content, operations, and client success**.

* Multi-agent orchestration system that allows **scaling across clients and industries**.

* Autonomous workflow for **lead scoring, personalized outreach, AI-driven calls, and conversion tracking**.

* Knowledge-sharing system to allow agents to **learn from each other and from client data**.

* Dashboard and reporting framework for entrepreneurs to **monitor and control their business at a glance**.



---



## **Why Join Us**



* Work on **cutting-edge AI technology** that could redefine entrepreneurship.

* Build a platform capable of scaling to **hundreds of thousands of clients worldwide**.

* Opportunity to shape the future of autonomous businesses.

* Competitive salary and the ability to work fully remote.

* Be part of a **visionary team building the “AWS for entrepreneurship”**.



---



### **Apply If You**



* Dream about building AI that **runs businesses autonomously**.

* Are excited by **complex multi-agent systems, workflows, and automation**.

* Want to **see your AI code directly generate real revenue and impact** for clients.



PLEASE SHARE YOUR AI PORTFOLIO OF AI PROJECTS TO REVIEW.

title: Virtual Assistants Need
description:
We are an e-commerce company based in California, USA. We've been in business for over ten years and have extensive experience in eCommerce. We're currently looking for a few high-energy, good communicators, punctual, able to follow instructions, analytical, and hard workers.



The ideal candidates must be fluent in English (both spoken and written) and have prior remote working experience. The candidates should be available to work 40 hours per week, have access to a fast and stable internet connection, and own a functioning web camera and microphone for daily video calls. The weekly salary is $200 per week via PayPal.



To skip the interview process and be considered for the position, please upload a video of yourself answering the questions below honestly and in detail, and provide the link. If we believe you’re a good fit for the role, we’ll send you a job offer within a few days.

2. What is your dream job?

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Media Buyer ( Lead generation)
description:
Dear Media Buyer,

We are looking for a talented and driven media buyer to join our team at a fast-growing lead generation company. Our goal is to generate as many leads as possible through our campaigns.

In this role, you will be responsible for managing our advertising campaigns. Your primary focus will be on analysing our campaigns (advertisements), completing data sheets, and launching and optimising advertisements on platforms such as
 and Instagram, ensuring that our creative expressions – photos and videos – stand out and convert.



As part of our team, you will take ownership of the full advertising process, from crafting strategies to testing and analyzing performance data. You’ll also play a key role in creating high-quality, visually appealing materials that align with our business and speak directly to our target audience.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager. You’re not only creative but also data-driven, with a sharp eye for detail and a passion for turning ideas into successful campaigns.



Should we enter into a long-term collaboration, you will first start by filling in the data sheets to make sure you have mastered that. Then we will move on to the tasks involved.

Please answer the following questions, if you are interested:



- Do you have experience with Ad Copys etc?

- Do you have experience in FB Ads Manager?

- Are you able to work structured, noting down the KPI’s?

- Can you work according to OUR strategy?

- Are you available for 3/4 hours a day, 6/7 days a week? And are you available to work more hours in about a few months?

- Are you familiar with technical ad terms , such as ROAS, CPA, CPC, frequency, etc.



As a Data entry operator you have:



- Good communication skills (Must!)

- Experience with working with workflows, video trainings

- Experience in noting down KPI’s in Google sheets (Must)

- Experience with workflows like Google sheets, Excel etc. (Must)

- Experience with different communication platforms (Slack)

- To ensure you have read this job description thoroughly, please include the word strawberry as the title of your application.

- Lots of experience with META ads manager and preferring in a
 structure (proxy) (MUST!)



If you do not meet the requirements, do NOT apply. (thank you)



* WORKFLOW IS PROVIDED THROUGH EVERY STEP OF THE PROCESS

* CAREER OPPORTUNITIES IN THE TEAM

* VIDEO TRAINING IS PROVIDED AS WELL



If you believe you’re the perfect fit for this role and can bring value to our company, we’d love to hear from you! Please respond to this post and provide details of your experience





Kind regards,



Daan & Teun

title: Video Editor Viral Short-Form Content / Reels - TikTok - YouTube Shorts
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY. LOOKING FOR A "WOW" EFFECT.



We are a creative media team working on two exciting projects: the launch campaign of an emerging music

artist and the promotional campaign for a feature film releasing in October. We are looking for talented

Filipino video editors who understand what makes content go viral on Western social media platforms and

can produce high-quality short-form videos consistently.



What you will be working on



You will edit short-form videos for two distinct campaigns running simultaneously:



MUSIC CAMPAIGN

Pairing songs of a new artist with fitting video clips

– animal footage, anime edits, epic cinematic

scenes, landscapes, emotional



The goal: organic virality that puts the music in

people's heads.





FILM CAMPAIGN

Creating appetite-building clips from film footage –

suspenseful cuts, emotional hooks, engaging

subtitles – designed to make people curious and

talk about the film before its October release 2026 in all german cinemas and on Netflix.





What we are looking for



 Strong instinct for what makes content go viral on Western platforms (TikTok US/EU,

Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



 Proficiency in at least one professional editing tool (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci

Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)



 Good PC/laptop and reliable internet connection – you must be able to handle video files and

deliver on time



 Ability to follow creative briefs and direction closely while bringing your own creative sense to

the execution



 Good English comprehension – you will receive instructions and feedback in English



? Available 4–6 hours per day, on a consistent schedule, for a duration of several months



Nice to have

Experience creating viral content yourself · Knowledge of current trends on Western TikTok /

Instagram Reels · Skills in subtitle styling and motion typography · Portfolio or examples of past edits

Compensation



Base rate: €4 EUR / hour 



Rate is performance-based and can go higher or lower depending on

quality, consistency, and results. 

Strong performers will be rewarded.



We are looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off.



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical editing test: we will send you raw video material

and a brief set of instructions. You will independently create a short-form video from this footage

according to our guidelines. This test is how we evaluate your instinct, creativity, and ability to follow

direction – no lengthy interviews, just your work speaking for itself.



How to apply

1. A short introduction – who you are, your editing background, and which tools you use

2. At least 2–3 examples of your video editing work (links to YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, etc.)

3. Your available hours per day and time zone

4. Your PC specs and which editing software you currently use



We are actively looking for young, hungry talent who genuinely understand social media and want to grow

with us. If you have the eye and the drive, we want to hear from you

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–3 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.

title: Landing Page Developer for DTC Ecommerce Brands (Replo/GemPages)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company working with multiple DTC brands to create high-converting landing pages and product pages. We're looking for a skilled Landing Page Developer who can take our Figma designs and turn them into pixel-perfect, lightning-fast Shopify pages using page builders like Replo or GemPages.



What you'll do:

• Develop landing pages, product pages, homepages, and advertorials in Shopify using Replo or GemPages

• Translate Figma designs into live pages as exact 1-to-1 replicas for both desktop and mobile

• Ensure all pages load fast and are fully optimized for page speed

• Integrate Shopify apps into pages (bundle apps, swatch apps, review widgets,
 capture forms)

• Write custom HTML, CSS, and Liquid code when page builders can't achieve the desired design or functionality

• Thoroughly self-test and QA every page before delivery, ensuring zero errors or layout issues

• Take on new projects weekly across multiple brands and occasionally update existing pages



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience developing Shopify pages using Replo or GemPages

• Ability to build pixel-perfect replicas of Figma designs on both desktop and mobile

• Strong understanding of page speed optimization on Shopify

• Experience integrating third-party Shopify apps into page builder layouts

• Custom coding skills (HTML, CSS, Liquid) to solve page builder limitations

• Extreme attention to detail in both design accuracy and functionality

• Self-sufficient QA process and experience working with DTC ecommerce brands



Nice to have:

• Experience with Shopify theme development or advanced Liquid customizations

• Familiarity with conversion rate optimization principles

• Experience working across multiple brands simultaneously



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'PageBuilder429'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Do you prefer working in Replo or GemPages, and why? What are the strengths and limitations of each in your experience?

2. How many hours would it take you to develop a mid-length product page from a completed Figma design into a fully functional page in a page builder? Walk us through how you estimate this.

3. What steps do you take to ensure that the pages you build load fast on Shopify? Which tools do you use to measure and optimize page speed?

4. What happens when a Figma design includes an element or interaction that is not natively possible in a page builder? Give a specific example of how you solved this with custom code.

5. Share a minimum of 3 to 5 links to live Shopify pages you have built using a page builder, with a brief explanation of your role in each project.

title: AI Automation Specialist - E-commerce (n8n, Make, Zapier)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company looking to supercharge our operations with AI automations. We need an AI automation specialist who can build powerful customer service automations and streamline our team's processes using the latest AI tools while also having the knowledge to custom code yourself.



What you'll do:

• Build and implement customer service automations

• Create workflow automations using n8n to optimize our team's daily processes

• Develop custom automations with Make, Zapier, Manus, Claude Code and more.

• Write custom code solutions when pre-built tools aren't enough

• Stay current with the newest AI tools and recommend implementations for our business

• Test, troubleshoot, and optimize automation workflows for maximum efficiency



What we're looking for:

• At least 6 months of hands-on AI automation experience

• Expert-level knowledge of n8n, Make, Zapier, Manus, and Claude Code

• Strong custom coding abilities (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

• Proven experience creating automations for e-commerce companies

• Deep understanding of customer service automation workflows

• Someone who actively follows and experiments with the latest AI tools



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AISpecialist'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk me through a specific CS automation you built for an e-commerce company using n8n. What triggers did you use, what APIs did you connect, and what was the end result?

2. Describe a complex workflow automation you created that required custom coding. What tools did you use, what code did you write, and how did it solve the problem?

3. What's the most recent AI tool you've experimented with in the past month, and how could it be applied to e-commerce automation?

4. Tell me about a time when pre-built automation tools weren't sufficient for a project. How did you approach building a custom solution?

5. Please share at least 3 automation examples you've created for e-commerce companies or customer service workflows. Include screenshots, workflow diagrams, or videos showing your n8n automations in action.

title: YouTube Expert Strategist Needed
description:
About us

We run a YouTube entertainment business across multiple channels. We have previously built a YouTube channel to over 300,000 subscribers, and we are now building new channels from scratch. 

We create highly engaging entertainment content and are looking for someone with strong, well-rounded YouTube experience who can support our CEO with the many different kinds of work that touch YouTube.



How you’ll work with us

The CEO leads the business. This role is not to run every part of the company alone, and not to personally own every single step of every video unless that’s what we agree together. 



We need someone who can assist the CEO with research, ideation, and judgment, bounce ideas, pressure-test concepts, and help us think through how to create content that is worthy of breaking out—including what strong performance and “viral potential” actually mean for our niches and channels.



You should understand YouTube from start to finish: how discovery and packaging work, what makes ideas strong or weak, and how to think about consistent, high-quality entertainment across multiple channels. 



You should be comfortable supporting both strategy and practical creation (e.g. research, outlines, packaging feedback), while recognizing the CEO makes the final calls.



What we’re looking for (in order of importance)

Deep YouTube expertise — Real experience across the full scope of YouTube work: research, content and packaging thinking, and how videos are planned and improved—not only one narrow task.



Ability to work with a founder/CEO — Clear communication, fast thinking, honest feedback, and real collaboration.



Bonus (valued, not required): Video editing and graphic design — we give extra consideration to candidates who can also deliver hands-on editing or visuals, but the core hire is YouTube judgment and expertise.



Requirements

Demonstrable YouTube experience — show channels, videos, or projects where you’ve had a real impact, and what you did.

Portfolio / links required — applications without relevant examples will not be considered.

Strong written English; short video calls when needed.

Reliable internet and professional communication.



Compensation

Negotiable — based on experience, expertise, and scope of responsibility (to be discussed with shortlisted candidates).

Hiring process



We will review applications, conduct interviews, and may invite finalists to a small paid test (brief and fair) so we can see how you think and work with us.



How to apply

IMPORTANT: Start your application subject line with the word YTEXPERT555 so we know you read this posting in full. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Please include:

1. Resume or CV

2 Portfolio / links — YouTube channels or videos relevant to your experience; note your role on each (required).

3. Your YouTube background — niches, types of content, and how you’ve helped build or improve channels or videos (metrics or outcomes if you can share them).

4. How you would support a CEO running multiple entertainment channels — short paragraph (a few sentences).

5. Your view on what makes YouTube content capable of going viral or breaking out — be specific; avoid generic motivational answers.

6. Rank your own skills (required) — For each item below, give one number from 1 to 10 (1 = weakest / least experience, 10 = strongest / most experience). Do not skip any line.

- Topic and trend research

- Script writing (hooks, structure, pacing)

- Thumbnail and packaging thinking (titles, thumbnails, concepts)

- Video editing

- Graphic design

7. Availability — timezone, hours per week, earliest start date.

8. Salary expectation — even though our offer is negotiable, share what you’re looking for in USD per month so we can align early.

title: AU Tax Accountant
description:
We believe our people are the foundation of our success. Our culture is built on respect, collaboration, and supporting one another.



We strive to create a workplace where employees feel valued, heard, and empowered to grow both personally and professionally. Our leadership is committed to fostering open communication, professional development, and a positive environment where everyone can perform at their best.



If you're looking for a company that values your contribution and supports your growth, we’d love to have you on our team.



Why Join Bravo?

We believe great people deserve great support. Here’s what you can expect when you join us:

-Competitive and stable full-time work from home opportunity

-HMO and Life Insurance coverage

-13th Month Pay

-Government Contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

-Sick Leave and Vacation Leave benefits

-Free Training and Professional Development opportunities

-Monthly Virtual Employee Engagement activities (with prizes!)

-Fun Company Get-Togethers

-An Annual Christmas Party that our team truly looks forward to

-Year-End Package



We make sure our team not only works hard, but also feels appreciated and celebrated.



About the Role

We are currently looking for four (4) experienced AU Tax Accountants to join our growing team.

In this role, you will work closely with an Australian firm handling tax compliance and accounting services for a diverse client base. This position offers the opportunity to further develop your expertise in Australian taxation while working in a supportive and collaborative environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Prepare and review Australian Tax Returns, BAS, and Financial Statements

-Ensure compliance with Australian tax regulations and legislation

-Provide tax planning support or advice to clients or internal stakeholders

-Analyze financial statements and provide insights where needed

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation



What We’re Looking For

-2–5+ years of Australian Tax and Business Services experience

-Ability to prepare tax returns for Individuals, Partnerships, Companies (including Group Companies), and Trusts

-Experience in preparing and reviewing Financial Statements

-Solid understanding of Australian tax legislation, including:

Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT)

Division 7A compliance and application

-Experience in preparing IAS and BAS

-Experience in tax planning is an advantage

-Strong analytical and communication skills

-Proficient in using Xero, XPM, and other accounting software

-Positive and proactive attitude with a fun team spirit

-Bookkeeping experience is a plus



If you're interested in this opportunity, feel free to apply through this job post or send your resume directly to 
 look forward to hearing from you!

title: Lead Reactivation Specialist
description:
Lead Reactivation Specialist

Part-Time Virtual Assistant | Remote (Philippines)

Warm Calling | Lead Follow-Up | CRM Management





About the Company

We are a boutique real estate agency based in Canberra (ACT), Australia, managing a portfolio of 300+ rental properties alongside an active property sales operation. We’ve been operating for several years and have built up a substantial database of past clients, former landlords, previous sales leads, and warm contacts.

We’re now looking for someone to unlock the value sitting in that database.

The Opportunity

We have a large database of contacts who have all had a previous touchpoint with our agency — these are not stone-cold leads. They include:

Former property management clients (landlords who were previously under our management)

Lapsed property management leads (landlords who enquired but didn’t sign up)

Past sales leads (buyers and sellers we’ve previously engaged with)

Former sales clients (owners who purchased or sold through us and may be ready to transact again)

Every contact in this database has an existing relationship with our agency. Your job is to re-engage them, have genuine conversations, identify opportunities, and book appointments for our team.

The Role

As our Lead Reactivation Specialist, you will work through our database systematically, making outbound calls and sending follow-up
s to re-engage past clients and warm leads. All activity is logged and tracked through our CRM.

Day-to-Day Responsibilities

Make outbound calls to past property management clients and former sales leads across our database

Identify landlords who may be looking to switch agencies, re-list their property for management, or sell

Identify past sales contacts who may be ready to buy, sell, or invest again

Follow up with lapsed contacts via phone and
 to re-establish the relationship

Qualify leads and book appointments for our property management and sales teams

Log all call outcomes, notes, and follow-up actions in the CRM after every contact

Maintain accurate, up-to-date records so no lead falls through the cracks

Provide regular reporting on call volume, contact outcomes, and conversions

Compensation

Base rate: AUD $10/hour

On top of the hourly rate, you earn performance bonuses for every lead you convert:

Conversion Type

Bonus (AUD)

Property signed to a management agreement

$100

Property listing signed and sold

$500



The more you convert, the more you earn. These bonuses are paid on top of your hourly rate and there is no cap on the number of bonuses you can earn.

Essential Skills & Experience

Excellent English speaking and comprehension — this is non-negotiable. You will be calling Australian property owners and having real conversations, not reading scripts. Your spoken English must be clear, confident, and natural.

Real estate industry experience — you must understand how property management and property sales work. Experience in acquisitions, settlements, leasing, or sales support is ideal.

Proven outbound calling experience — cold calling, warm calling, lead follow-up, or customer reactivation. We need someone comfortable picking up the phone.

CRM proficiency — all calls and outcomes must be logged in our CRM. You need to be disciplined about recording every interaction, not just the wins.

Professional phone manner — warm, friendly, and consultative. These are people who already know our agency, so the tone needs to be relationship-driven, not salesy.

Ability to work AEST-aligned hours (Australian Eastern Standard Time) — you need to be calling during Australian business hours.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment for calls.

Desirable (Not Essential)

Experience working with Australian clients or businesses

Experience with Australian property CRM platforms (Agentbox, Rex, PropertyMe, or similar)

Familiarity with Australian real estate terminology (management agreement, exclusive agency, settlement, strata)

Team leadership or call centre supervisory experience

 marketing or follow-up sequence experience

What We Offer

AUD $10/hour base rate paid via Wise (international transfer)

Uncapped performance bonuses — $100 per management sign-up, $500 per property sold

Part-time hours to start, with the opportunity to expand based on results

Direct reporting line to the Managing Director — no layers of middle management

A warm database of contacts who already know our agency — you’re not starting from scratch

A supportive team that values initiative, clear communication, and results





How to Apply

Please submit the following:

Your CV/resume highlighting relevant real estate and calling experience

A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself in English — tell us about your real estate experience and why this role interests you. This can be a simple phone recording or voice memo. This is the single most important part of your application.

A brief note outlining what CRM platforms you have used and your experience with them

Any relevant portfolio work or references from previous real estate roles

Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

We’re hiring for spoken English ability as much as experience. The voice recording lets us hear how you communicate — it doesn’t need to be perfect, it needs to be natural and clear.

title: *Female* Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)
description:
Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)



Salary: 1,500 USD / month realistic ($500 base + 1,000 performance + bonuses)

Work Hours: Night shift PH time, 5 days/week (including weekends)



About the Role

BeautyGrow helps US med spas fill their calendars with lip filler, facial balancing, and Botox appointments.



We run the ads. Leads come to us.

Your job: turn those warm leads into booked appointments by calling and texting fast, every day, following our proven system. We obsess over speed, because calling leads in under 60 seconds massively increases shows and sales. 







This is full?time, long?term, and performance?driven.



What You’ll Do (Daily)

You will live in two modes: HUNTING and CLOSING.



HUNTING (whenever you are not on a live call):



Call all new leads within 60 seconds of them opting in, unless you are currently on a call. 



,

Work all our client accounts in this exact order:

New leads

Callbacks

Warm replies (people asking to book or pay)

Smart?list follow?ups (older warm leads)



Use GoHighLevel (GHL) and Slack so no lead is left untouched during your shift.



CLOSING (when you are talking to a lead):



Follow our C.L.O.S.E.R. script word?for?word, but naturally.

Ask about their goals, clarify their problems, explain the treatment simply, and book them into a time that works.

Handle basic concerns on price / fear / timing and then lock in their appointment so they actually show.



You will be setting for multiple med spa clients, not just one.



What Success Looks Like

You are considered a strong setter here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 



Your queues (new, callbacks, warm, follow?ups) are cleared every shift.



You hit and beat your daily booking targets and help drive high show rates. 





Your notes are clear, your tone is professional, and clients compliment your responsiveness.

Compensation

Monthly performance bonuses may be up to +$500 USD (on top of $1500 salary)

Uncapped +5 bonus USD for every low?ticket booking

Realistic total for solid performers: around 1,500 USD+ per month

We reward consistent execution, not politics.



Requirements (Non?Negotiable)



You are based in the Philippines and comfortable working US EST night shifts (including weekends).

Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.



Stable home setup:

At least 100 Mbps up and down internet.

No frequent power outages, or you have a reliable backup solution.

Good headset and quiet work environment.



You are hungry to get very good at sales / appointment setting, not just “have a job.”

Experience in call centers / outbound sales / appointment setting is a plus, but we will train the right person who has the work ethic and coachability.



Culture & Training

We joke a lot, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is:



Be the best.

Have fun doing it.

You get:



A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook explaining exactly how to win here.

Script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews so you “breathe the script,” not just read it.



Clear KPIs and coaching so your skills and income grow over time.

We like people who show up every day, do the boring work, take feedback, and raise the bar for the whole team.



—--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**HOW TO APPLY**



Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: Female Remote Inbound Appointment Setter (Med Spa)
description:
We help med spas pack their calendars with lip filler and 
 appointments using
 ads. You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. That means you are not “just a caller” – you are the front line of revenue.



We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

Non?negotiables:

Comfortable working EST shifts (either 8 am – 3 pm or 3 pm – 11 pm), 5 days per week including rotating weekends with your teammates.





Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.





Internet at least 100 Mbps up and down, stable power (or a reliable backup).





Quality headset, quiet workspace, large monitor + laptop.





Experience in appointment setting, call center, sales, or high?volume customer support is preferred, but raw coachability and work ethic matter more.





Tools you will use daily: GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack





How We Train You:

You get a full playbook and training system:

Daily script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews in week one.

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook that shows you exactly how to win here.

Ongoing coaching so your skills and income go up over time.





The people who win here:

Show up every day and do the repetitive work.

Take notes, ask questions, and actually fix their mistakes.

Treat this like a career, not a side hustle.





**How To Apply**

Send over a voice recording from

title: Creative Strategist ( Facebook)
description:
Hello,

We are a performance-driven marketing team that generates leads at scale for our supplier through Meta Ads 
 & Instagram). For us, it’s all about one thing: results. No vanity metrics, no fluff.

That’s why we’re looking for a Creative Strategist to run and optimize our entire creative engine.

What you’ll be doing

Full responsibility for our ad creatives

Coming up with concepts that directly address pain points and buying behavior

Writing scripts for high-converting video ads

Copywriting for static ads and video (hooks, body, CTAs)

Collaborating with editors/designers (or creating content yourself)

Continuously testing, iterating, and scaling winning creatives

Analyzing data (CTR, CPA, hooks, retention) and driving decisions based on it

Developing new angles, hooks, and formats based on performance

Who you are

You don’t think like a “creative,” but like a marketer who sells

You understand how to grab attention in the first 3 seconds

You know how to translate a product into irresistible messaging

You have experience with Meta Ads (or are willing to master it quickly)

You’re obsessed with performance and numbers

You’re fast, sharp, and take ownership

You have no ego—just a focus on what works

Who you’re NOT

Someone who wants to create “pretty content” without a goal

Someone who needs inspiration to get started

Someone who waits for instructions

What you’ll get

Direct impact on growth and revenue

Working in a team that values results above all else

Plenty of room to test, fail, and succeed

Opportunity to advance as you deliver results

Important

If you can’t demonstrate that your creatives have delivered results (leads, sales, CPA reduction, etc.), then this isn’t for you.

We’re not looking for an artist.

We’re looking for a killer.

Interested?

Send us:

Examples of ads/creatives you’ve created

Results (CTR, CPA, ROAS, etc.)

A brief explanation of your thought process behind those creatives

No portfolio = no response.

Best regards,

Daan & Teun

title: Graphic Designer (Growth Path Into Marketing & Creative Direction)
description:
Graphic Designer (Growth Path Into Marketing & Creative Direction)



We’re looking for a skilled graphic designer to join our creative team.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys designing but also wants to learn the marketing side behind high-performing ads.



You’ll work inside a team of designers and collaborate directly with our marketing department. If you want long-term growth, structure, and a chance to develop into a more strategic creative role, this is for you.



What You’ll Do



Create 20 high-quality static ads per day (product shots, collages, lifestyle scenes, simple UGC-style frames)



Work in a team of multiple graphic designers



Use Gemini / Canva / Photoshop (or your preferred workflow)



Design ads that look trustworthy, clean, and authentic



Help brainstorm new creative angles and concepts



Follow brand guidelines and maintain a consistent visual identity



Use performance feedback to improve your designs



Salary & Bonus System



Base salary: $400/month



Bonus system: the best-performing designer can DOUBLE their salary



Bonuses are based on creative performance and impact



Clear structure, transparent system



Top creatives get rewarded heavily



This isn’t a typical low-level design job — we invest in designers who show growth and ownership.



What You’ll Learn



You don’t need previous marketing experience — you will learn it on the job.



You’ll gain real performance marketing knowledge, including:



What makes an ad convert



How to build creatives using trust / scarcity / authority / offer principles



How to read basic performance data (CTR, CPC, Hook Rate)



How to think in marketing angles, not just visuals



How to build creatives for older demographics (40–70+)



How real ecommerce brands scale through creative testing



If you want to grow from a designer ? into someone who understands marketing ? and eventually creative direction, this role gives you that path.



Who We’re Looking For



A graphic designer with a good eye and strong aesthetic taste



Able to design fast while keeping quality high



Comfortable giving and receiving feedback



Interested in learning the marketing strategy behind your work



Reliable, consistent, and proactive



Someone who wants long-term growth, not just tasks



Bonus Skills



(Not required, but helpful)



Meta/Facebook ad experience



Photoshop or advanced Canva knowledge



Ecommerce or jewelry ad experience



Understanding of performance metrics



Why Join Us



100% remote



Work inside a structured creative team, not alone



Clear expectations, clear goals



Fast feedback loops



A stable brand with long-term growth



A real opportunity to move into creative direction + marketing if you grow



This role is for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to be part of a bigger creative engine — not just a production designer.

title: Finance Assistant (Spreadsheet-Focused) Global E-commerce Jewelry Brand
description:
Finance Assistant (Spreadsheet-Focused)

Global E-commerce Jewelry Brand



We are looking for a Finance Assistant with strong spreadsheet skills who wants to work at the core of a fast-growing global e-commerce company.



This role is focused on supporting daily financial operations while using spreadsheets as your main tool to keep everything accurate, structured, and under control.



You will work with real financial data across payment processors, banks, advertising platforms, and suppliers. Your work directly impacts how well the company understands its numbers and makes decisions.



If you are detail-oriented, structured, and comfortable working with data, this is a strong opportunity to build real experience in e-commerce finance.



What You Will Be Responsible For



Daily Financial Tracking



* Record and organize:

  Sales

  Refunds

  Chargebacks

  Advertising spend

  Cost of goods sold

  Operational expenses



Payout Tracking



* Maintain the payout tracker across multiple payment processors

* Track payout statuses and timelines

* Record fees, deductions, and adjustments



Transaction Verification



* Cross-check financial data between:

  Bank accounts

  Payment processors

  Internal records

* Identify and flag inconsistencies



Reconciliation



* Reconcile payouts and transactions across platforms

* Ensure all financial data is complete and accurate



Payables Tracking



* Track vendor payments

* Track advertising spend and outstanding balances



Monthly Analysis & Reporting



* Analyze:

  Processor fees

  Platform charges

  Payout summaries



* Support preparation of:

  Profit & Loss

  Cash Flow

  Balance tracking



Data Accuracy



* Identify errors or missing data

* Investigate differences and resolve them

* Improve spreadsheet structure over time



Requirements



* Experience as a Finance Assistant, Bookkeeper, or similar role



* Strong skills in Excel or Google Sheets



* Comfortable with:

  SUMIFS

  VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP

  Basic financial calculations



* High attention to detail



* Structured and organized way of working



* Strong sense of responsibility with financial data



* Able to work independently and handle repetitive tasks accurately



* Willing to learn and improve



Nice to Have (Not Required)



* Experience with e-commerce or online businesses

* Experience with payment processors (Shopify Payments, PayPal, etc.)

* Basic understanding of financial reporting



What This Role Offers



* Work inside a global e-commerce operation

* Gain hands-on experience with real financial flows

* Learn how financial operations work across multiple platforms

* Grow into more advanced roles in:

  Finance Operations

  Financial Analysis

  E-commerce Finance



This role is ideal for someone who is strong with spreadsheets and wants to apply those skills in a real finance environment with real impact.



Apply here:

[
](
)

title: [URGENT] $50 Per Sale - US Fiber Infrastructure Outreach (Government-Backed)
description:
Job Description:

Poyo Group LLC is looking for 2-3 elite outbound "hunters" for a long-term US telecom project. We are transitioning American businesses from old, insecure copper lines to 2-Gig Fiber.



Why this is an easy close for you:

There is a mandatory US push to move businesses to fiber by 2028. Because of this, the state is covering the installation costs and the first 2 months for the business.



You aren't selling. You are updating them on their eligibility.



NO Credit Cards required from the customer.



NO Contracts.



Free 60-Day Trial.



Compensation:



$50.00 USD per successful installation.



Paid weekly via Wise or Direct Deposit.



Top reps can easily hit 5+ installs per week ($250/week) once they master the script.



The Mission:

The old copper lines are physically degrading and unsecure. Your job is to call business owners, explain the 2028 infrastructure mandate, and get them enrolled in the 60-day pilot program so they can test the speed for themselves.



Requirements:



Excellent, clear English (No thick accents).



Must have a noise-canceling headset and backup power (no power outage excuses).



Willing to work US EST hours.



How to Apply:



Send a link to a 30-second voice recording. No recording = No interview.



Tell me about your experience with US Cold Calling.

title: Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)
description:
Job Title



Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)



Overview



We’re hiring a reliable Social Media Growth Manager to run day-to-day social execution across a small portfolio of UK brands:

 • Medica Universal (GP-led healthcare + weight loss) - Medica.Universal (IG)

 • Rosetta Property Company (UK property investment + HMOs + short-term rentals) - RosettaProperties (IG)

 • Dr Perminder (personal brand content: health, business, and leadership)

 • Moonstar Media (creative/content brand supporting video, storytelling, and production)



This is an execution role with clear SLAs. You will work in ClickUp, follow workflows, publish consistently, and report weekly. You will also repurpose SEO blogs into newsletters and social assets.



Hours (UK time)



10 hours/week to start, with fixed daily cover windows required.

Hours are expected to increase over the next 2–3 months if performance is strong.



Pay



Base: $4/hr

Performance add-ons available (based on outputs, reliability, KPIs, and growth metrics)



Non-Negotiables

 • ClickUp is the source of truth (no WhatsApp-only working)

 • Weekly output targets and reporting are mandatory

 • Clear communication and reliability are essential



Core Responsibilities

 1. Content execution + scheduling



 • Build and maintain a weekly content plan

 • Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn (and other platforms as assigned)

 • Keep a clean content calendar with deadlines and approvals



 2. Community management + engagement



 • Respond to comments and DMs within agreed response windows

 • Use templates/SOPs to follow up leads and move them to booking/enquiry steps



 3. Meta Ads support (important)



 • Set up and manage basic Meta campaigns (lead form + traffic + retargeting) OR support and coordinate ads delivery if you are not fully advanced

 • Track spend, leads, CPL, and outcomes

 • Report performance weekly with clear next steps



 4. Repurposing workflow (important)



 • Convert approved SEO blogs into:

 • newsletters 
 format)

 • carousels (6–10 slides)

 • short captions and posts

 • Follow our templates and workflow (brief ? draft ? approval ? schedule ? report)



 5. Weekly reporting



 • Submit a weekly report every Friday (what shipped + metrics + what’s next)



SLAs (must agree)

 • ClickUp updates: every assigned task must have “Next step + ETA” (no reactions-only updates)

 • Response time: acknowledge messages within 24 hours on working days (within cover windows faster)

 • Weekly deliverables:

 • content plan posted in ClickUp by Monday 12pm UK

 • minimum 5-10 posts scheduled/published per week (platform split agreed)

 • engagement log updated

 • weekly report by Friday 5pm UK



Tools you must use

 • ClickUp (task management)

 • Google Drive (assets/SOPs)

 • Meta Business Suite

Bonus: Canva, Mailchimp/Klaviyo (or similar), basic analytics



Application Instructions (important)



Start your application with the word: Workflow



Include:

 1. Confirmation you accept $4/hr base + performance add-ons

 2. Your fixed weekly availability in UK time (must include daily cover windows)

 3. Two examples of accounts/content you managed (links)

 4. Meta Ads experience: Yes/No. If yes, include results (spend, leads, CPL, ROAS if applicable)



Answer these 3 questions:

A) How would you turn an SEO blog into (1) a newsletter and (2) a 6-slide carousel?

B) What does your weekly report include (exact headings)?

C) Confirm you will work in ClickUp and follow SLAs (Yes/No)



Applications without “Workflow” will not be considered.

title: Quality Assurance Specialist (Home Health)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Clinical Documentation & Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist to support our Home Health Agency. The ideal candidate must have a strong knowledge of clinical documentation, home health regulations, and quality standards (OASIS, CMS, CoPs). This role ensures accuracy, compliance, and completeness of all patient records and supports the agency in delivering high-quality care.



Key Responsibilities

1. Clinical Documentation Review

Review all clinical notes (SN, PT, OT, ST, MSW, HHA) for accuracy, completeness, and compliance.

Ensure documentation reflects medical necessity, skilled services, and the Plan of Care (POC).

Audit OASIS assessments for accuracy and congruency with patient condition and visit notes.

Ensure timely submission of documentation per agency standards.



2. Chart Audits & Compliance

Conduct routine chart audits for SOC, Recertification, ROC, Transfers, and Discharges.

Ensure all required documents are present (physician orders, consents, supplemental orders, POCs).

Monitor visit frequency, discipline coordination, and regulatory timelines.

Identify deficiencies and provide corrective action guidance.



3. Quality Improvement Activities

Participate in the agency’s QAPI program.

Track and analyze QA metrics (infections, hospitalizations, falls, adverse events, missed visits).

Assist in identifying trends and implementing improvement plans.



4. Staff Education & Support

Support clinicians with documentation, POC, orders, and compliance-related questions.



5. Coordination & Communication

Collaborate with the care team and administrative staff to ensure alignment with QA standards.

Communicate QA findings professionally with recommendations for correction.

Follow up to ensure timely completion of revisions and updates.



6. Other Duties

Assist with preparation for state surveys and accreditation visits.

Review and update QA-related policies and procedures.

Participate in case conferences as needed.



Monthly Rate: P18,000 starting



Equipment:

• Laptop or desktop computer

• Stable internet connection

• Webcam

• Headset/earphones



If you are passionate about accurate documentation, quality care, and supporting a high-performing healthcare team, we encourage you to apply.



Kindly submit your resume with the subject title “Home Health QA”.

Send your application to:

title: Full-Time Remote Bookkeeper
description:
We are seeking a highly meticulous and proactive Remote Bookkeeper to join our team on a full-time basis. This role is critical to our financial health and requires an individual who thrives on precision, operational oversight, and forward-thinking financial management.



The successful candidate will work within the EST Time Zone and will be responsible for ensuring the absolute integrity of our financial records while providing actionable insights to management.



Key Responsibilities and Non-Negotiables

Financial Accuracy and Attention to Detail

Verify all incoming invoices and approve bills with 100?curacy.



Ensure all ledger entries are correct; errors in cash flow or budget tracking are considered unacceptable.



Conduct regular reconciliations to maintain "audit-ready" books at all times.



Budget Management and Reporting

Track individual project budgets and monitor daily expenses against set limits.



Proactively alert management the 
nt spending exceeds or is projected to exceed established thresholds.



Generate clear, comprehensive, and timely reports regarding project-specific budgets and overall company cash flow.



Cash Flow Forecasting

Maintain a rolling 2-week forecast of upcoming payments and cash requirements.



Identify and flag potential shortfalls or liquidity issues well before they impact operations.



Proactivity and Operational Oversight

Actively monitor transactions beyond simple data entry (e.g., verifying that deposits have cleared and payments were processed successfully).



Take full initiative to resolve discrepancies and financial hurdles without requiring constant supervision.



Technical Proficiency

Demonstrate expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop, and Xero.



Exhibit strong digital literacy in managing financial data and preparing complex digital reports.



Communication and Collaboration

Provide regular, concise updates and financial insights to the management and operations teams.



Diligently follow up on pending items and outstanding documentation to ensure no financial task remains unfinished.

title: Graphic Designer / Production Artist
description:
DTF Virginia is seeking an experienced Graphic Designer / Production Artist who fully understands DTF production requirements, Roland workflows, and specialty-effect artwork. This position requires someone who can consistently deliver accurate, print-ready files without oversight or rework.



This role supports customers who submit artwork via
, requiring precise interpretation of specifications and flawless production execution.

Core Responsibilities (Daily Work)

• Create accurate, error-free gang sheets for customers who submit artwork via
, strictly following provided specifications (sizes, quantities, spacing, and layout).

• Vector, redraw, clean up, and improve customer artwork as needed.

• Prepare artwork specifically for DTF printing, including correct sizing, clean vectors, smooth edges, optimized paths, and production-safe line thickness.

• Identify and correct issues that could impact print quality or adhesion.

• Add clean, accurate cut lines for Roland print/cut workflows.

• Prepare fully print-ready files for Roland production with no downstream adjustments.

• Create and prepare spangle files for production use.

• Apply faux specialty effects including faux embroidery (digitized embroidery-style artwork), faux glitter, sparkle, textured, and 3D effects.

• Understand and apply digitizing principles when creating embroidery-style effects for print.

• Apply spot colors correctly for textured UV printing.

• Create clean, print-safe halftone artwork.

• Accurately replicate fonts when required.

title: Property Manager – Short-Term Rentals
description:
Property Manager – Short-Term Rentals

Bali & Australia | Remote | Long-Term Role



We manage premium short-term rentals across Bali and Australia and are hiring an experienced Property Manager to oversee day-to-day operations.



This role starts part-time (10–15 hours per week) with a clear pathway to full-time within 2–3 months for the right person.



Before You Apply – Please Read Carefully

- This is not an entry-level role

- Guesty + OTA experience is mandatory

- You must be confident handling guest issues independently

- This is a long-term role with growth opportunities



If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply.



The Role

As Property Manager, you will be responsible for the day-to-day operational performance of our portfolio — ensuring listings run smoothly, guests are well looked after, and on-the-ground teams are prepared and aligned.



Key responsibilities include:



- Managing live listings across Airbnb, 
, VRBO/Stayz and other OTAs

- Handling guest communication from enquiry through to post check-out

- Coordinating housekeeping and maintenance teams

- Scheduling cleans, maintenance tasks and urgent call-outs

- Ensuring properties meet high cleanliness and presentation standards

- Troubleshooting guest issues calmly and professionally

- Supporting daily operations and administration, including:



- Managing
s

- Filing and sorting

- Sending invoices to accounts

- Uploading receipts to Hubdoc and Guesty for properties and the business

- Creating, refining and implementing SOPs to streamline operations (this is a key part of the role)



What We’re Looking For

This is not a junior role. We are looking for someone who understands the short-term rental industry and thrives in a fast-moving environment.



You must have:



- 3+ years’ experience in short-term rental, hotel or accommodation management

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong problem-solving skills and calm decision-making under pressure

- Experience managing contractors (cleaners, maintenance, trades)

- High attention to detail and pride in quality standards

- Strong organisation and time-management skills

- Must be efficient

- Confidence handling guest complaints and sensitive situations

- Ability to follow systems and improve them

- Availability to respond to urgent matters when required



Industry knowledge required:



- Solid understanding of Australian and/or Asian STR markets

- Awareness of guest expectations in premium or luxury accommodation



Software & Platform Experience (Essential)

You must be confident with:



- Guesty

- OTA setup and management

- Airbnb, 
, VRBO / Stayz, Expedia, Marriott Homes, 
 and others

-  WhatsApp (daily operational communication)



No Guesty + OTA experience = do not apply.



Bonus (not essential):



- SuiteOp experience



Hours, Pay & Growth



- Start: 10–15 hours per week

- Progression: Full-time role within approximately 2–3 months (performance-based)

- USD $7-8 per hour (reviewed as the role expands)

-  Schedule: Flexible, with some responsiveness required outside standard hours



This is a long-term position for someone looking to grow with the business.



How to Apply (Important)

To be considered, please submit all of the following:



1. Resume

   Highlight relevant STR, hotel or property management experience.



2. Short Video Introduction (Priority)

   Please tell us:



* Who you are

* Your STR experience

* Why this role interests you



Applications with a video will be prioritised.



3. Written responses to the questions below

   Detailed, structured answers are required. Short or vague responses will not be considered.



4. Tell us about a time a guest complained about cleaning standards. What steps did you take from complaint to resolution, and how did you prevent it from happening again?



5. A guest reports an urgent issue at 11:30pm (e.g. no hot water or AC failure). Walk us through exactly what you would do, step-by-step.



6. You notice a property has received two 4-star reviews in a row due to small maintenance issues. What actions would you take operationally and strategically?



7. This role involves building and improving SOPs. Share an example of a process or system you’ve created or improved. What problem did it solve and what was the outcome?



30-day paid trial applies.



Applications that do not answer all questions will not be considered.



Final filter

To confirm you have read this post carefully, start your application with the words:



I have Guesty + OTA experience.

description:

title: Social Media Outreach for Property Management Business
description:
Job Title

Virtual Assistant - Social Media Outreach & Lead Generation for Airbnb Management Business



About The Role

I'm looking for a reliable, hard-working individual to help me scale outreach for my Airbnb property management business. You'll be sending personalised messages to landlords and property owners on Instagram,
, and other social media platforms using pre-written scripts I provide.

This is a straightforward, script-based role. Your job is to follow the processes, send quality messages, track responses, and help me connect with potential clients who might benefit from our service. 



What You'll Be Doing

Sending personalised outreach messages to targeted landlords and property owners on Instagram,
, and other platforms

Following pre-written scripts I provide (you'll adapt names, details, and personalisation points)

Manage outreach lists - I'll provide you with contact lists; you'll work through them systematically

Track and log responses in a simple spreadsheet (e.g. number of messages sent, contact details, whether they responded positively or declined/ignored)

Flag interested leads for me to follow up with directly

Maintain professional, friendly communication that represents my brand well

Work within platform limits to avoid spam flags or account restrictions



Requirements

Essential:

Fluent English (written) - messages must be natural, grammatically correct, and professional

Experience with messaging on Instagram,
 and other social media platforms - you know how to send DMs, navigate platforms, and avoid being flagged as spam

Attention to detail - you can personalise messages accurately (names, company names, specifics)

Reliable and consistent - you can commit to 100 messages a day

Good communication - you respond promptly and keep me updated on progress

Comfortable with repetitive tasks - this is high-volume outreach, so you need to be consistent and disciplined



Highly Desirable:

Previous experience in cold outreach and lead generation

Familiarity with property management, real estate, or landlord niches

Experience using spreadsheets to track outreach

Knowledge of Instagram/Facebook messaging best practices to avoid spam filters



What I'll Provide You

Pre-written outreach scripts (you'll adapt with names and personalisation)

Contact lists with names, account handles, and any relevant details

Clear instructions on how to personalise and send messages

A simple tracking template to log responses

Ongoing support - I'm available to answer questions and refine the process



Ideal Candidate

You're someone who:

Is organised and process-driven - you follow systems well

Takes pride in quality work - even if it's repetitive, you do it properly

Is trustworthy and professional - you're representing my business

Can work independently - you don't need constant supervision

Is comfortable with rejection - not everyone will respond positively, and that's fine



Deliverables & Expectations

Send 100 personalized messages per day

Maintain a daily activity log showing:

Number of messages sent

Number of responses received

Number of interested leads flagged

Name and contact details of lead for follow up

Flag interested leads within 24 hours so I can follow up quickly

Respond to any clarifying questions from contacts professionally (using guidance I provide)



Work Schedule & Commitment

40 hours per week (flexible schedule, but consistent output required)

100 messages per day target

Preferred working hours: UK time 9am-5pm

Availability for brief weekly check-ins via WhatsApp to sync on progress

This post is for 1 month initially, with the potential for a longer term agreement dependant on the success during this month



How to Apply

Please fill in the following application form at the link below:


 



Red Flags (Please Do Not Apply If):

You plan to use bots or automation

You can't commit to consistent, quality work

You're not fluent in written English

You're not comfortable with direct outreach/sales messaging



Next Steps

If this sounds like a good fit, please apply at the link below. I'll review applications and reach out to shortlisted candidates within 48 hours for a brief interview.

Looking forward to working with someone reliable who can help me scale this outreach effectively!



Application Form


 



Jak Parker

Jak Parker Property Management

:

title: Real Estate Data Pipeline Manager
description:
We are building a county-by-county real estate data pipeline system across New Jersey focused on off-market opportunities.



This is NOT a basic VA/data entry role.



We are looking for a data operator who can think, solve problems, and build structured lead pipelines using multiple data sources.



You will be responsible for identifying, collecting, organizing, and maintaining high value real estate data across multiple counties.



You will work directly with tools like DataSift, SmrtPhone, Smarter Contact, Skip Tracing platforms, PropStream, and REI Reply.



Your job is to turn raw county data into clean, actionable lead lists.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD (PER COUNTY):



Probate / Heirship Records

Foreclosure / Lis Pendens

Tax Sale / Auction Lists

Tax Delinquency Lists

Code Violations

Condemned / Unsafe Structures

Mechanic’s Liens

IRS / State Tax Liens

HOA / Condo Liens

Utility Shut-Off Lists

Open / Expired Building Permits (City + County)

Fire Damage Reports

Sinkhole / Subsidence Data

Medicaid Recovery Liens

Eviction Records / Detainer Warrants

Child Support Judgment Liens

Quiet Title Suits (Post Tax Deed)



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



Research and locate county-level data sources (websites, portals, public records)

Extract and organize data into structured formats

Clean and deduplicate records before importing into DataSift

Maintain clear documentation for each county (sources, process, notes)

Integrate data into our CRM and marketing systems

Use AI tools (Claude) to assist with data cleaning and structuring

Coordinate with team for consistency across counties



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:



You MUST have experience with at least 3 of the following:



DataSift

PropStream

REI Reply

Smarter Contact

SmrtPhone

Skip Tracing tools

Real estate lead generation systems



YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:



You can figure things out without step-by-step instructions

You are comfortable working with messy or incomplete data

You think in systems, not tasks

You write clean, organized notes and processes

You care about accuracy and consistency



YOU ARE NOT A FIT IF:



You only do basic data entry

You need constant supervision

You avoid problem-solving

You have no real estate data experience



COMPENSATION:



Starting: $4–$6/hour depending on experience

Performance-based increases available

Long-term role with growth into senior data roles



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (REQUIRED):



Answer the following:



Describe how you would find and build a tax delinquency list for a county with no obvious download available.

What tools have you used for skip tracing and how do you verify accuracy?

Which of the following have you personally worked with: DataSift, PropStream, REI Reply, Smarter Contact, SmrtPhone?

Provide a brief example of a dataset you organized or cleaned.



Applications without answers will NOT be considered.

We are hiring a DENTAL BILLING ASSISTANT to support billing tasks, verify procedure codes, and ensure accuracy of dental transactions.

, or text outside scheduled hours when needed.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy—especially with codes and documentation.



“Get things done” attitude and ability to work under deadlines.
