title: Sales Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a Sales Coordinator to work remotely from the Philippines, supporting the Managing Director who will be based at the development’s display suite in Australia five days a week.

Your role is to keep the sales pipeline warm, the appointment diary full, and prospective buyers informed and engaged. You are the first point of contact for enquiries and the engine behind the campaign’s day-to-day marketing and lead management. You do not need to close sales — you need to qualify leads, book appointments, and ensure every prospective buyer receives a professional, timely response.

Essential Skills & Experience

Excellent written and spoken English — professional, warm, and polished (you will be communicating directly with high-net-worth buyers)

Minimum 2 years’ experience in real estate sales support, property marketing, or project marketing (off-the-plan experience highly regarded)

Proven experience with appointment setting, lead follow-up, and CRM/database management

 marketing experience — building and sending campaigns via Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, or similar platforms

Strong proficiency with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar)

Canva proficiency for creating on-brand graphics and marketing materials

Minimum 20 hours a week with a long-term 2-year campaign horizon

Competitive hourly rate paid via Wise (international transfer)

Direct reporting line to the Managing Director — you won’t be lost in a team of 50

A clearly scoped role with defined deliverables and expectations

Opportunity to be part of a high-profile luxury development campaign from launch to completion

A supportive, professional team that values initiative and clear communication

2-week paid trial period with clear deliverables to ensure mutual fit

title: Google Ads Manager
description:
With our recent expansion, we're excited to be hiring lively, hard-working Google Ads professionals to our team! Before we get into the specifics, let us tell you about our company:



Why Join BIG Marketing:



- Work in the US market with a talented team on an exciting mission!

- Paid time off for US Non-Working Holidays.

- Year-End Bonus.

- Company-sponsored learning.

- Comprehensive pay: $5 - $8/hour based on experience and knowledge.

- Opportunity for promotion and pay increases based on yearly performance review.



About BIG:



BIG Marketing & SEO is a digital marketing agency with extensive experience in helping companies grow their profits through SEO and Google Ads. We pride ourselves in delivering the most effective ad campaigns that produce measurable results!



Our company's mission is:



To create a better world through better marketing. 



Some of our core values include:



- Be the best.

- Do the impossible.

- Have fun.

- Make it simple.

- Care for others.



We're not just looking for a Google Ads specialist; we're looking for that perfect person who will be a team player, meet our core values, and win with us.



DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Below is a list of some of the various tasks you'll be required to do to perform well on the job:



- Setting up Google Ads campaigns from scratch (mostly search campaigns and sometimes display campaigns).

- Taking over existing Google Ads campaigns.

- Connecting Google Ads to Google Analytics.

- Monitoring Google Ads and making adjustments to lower CPC.

- Setting up conversion tracking.

- Setting up keywords and negative keywords.

- Making bid adjustments.

- Optimizing landing pages for higher quality scores (you will not be required to design pages).

- Strategizing with the team on offers that could create higher conversions.

- Attending company meetings on Zoom.



REQUIREMENTS



- Proven Google Ads experience: A minimum of 4 years.

- In-depth experience with conversion tracking.

- Proven record of lowering ad costs through optimization.

- Proven record of increasing lead volume through Google Ads, without increasing ad budget.

- Excellent English speaking skills.

- An expert understanding of technical terms related to Google Ads and the web.



- A backup or dual internet connection must be set up.

- At least a quad-core CPU for the computer/laptop you're using (the faster the better!)



BONUS QUALIFICATIONS (Not Required)



If you have any of the following skills, please let us know!



- Landing page development.

- Web design.

-
 Ads management.



IMPORTANT: Our management team feels every person should have a good work-life balance and we try to create a very comfortable remote work environment. That said, it's also important to us that we can also see what work is being done. So we use Time Doctor for very light management and coordination. 



If you've made it this far, please introduce yourself in a 3-minute video and share it when you apply! Please also add why you believe you'd be a good fit for our team by filling out our application form below:



Application Form: 



Website: 



NOTE: We get a lot of applicants on this platform. The applicants we are most serious about considering are those who are willing to introduce themselves in a video and also fill out our application form. We're excited to meet you and look forward to flourishing together!

title: Construction Project Manager
description:
About Us

At Structura Builders, we’re raising the bar on what it means to build with integrity, precision, and care. With offices in San Diego, CA & Minneapolis, MN, we specialize in high-performance commercial and mixed-use projects. As we expand our presence in California & Minnesota and beyond, we're seeking a Remote Construction Project Manager to drive project execution, collaborate across teams, and deliver exceptional results — all while upholding our commitment to quality, safety, and innovation.



The Role

We’re looking for an experienced, proactive, and highly organized Construction Project Manager to join our team remotely and lead project execution from preconstruction through closeout. You’ll be responsible for project planning, subcontractor coordination, and ensuring that projects are completed safely, on time, and within budget. Working closely with field teams and senior leadership, you’ll help ensure Structura Builders delivers on its promise of excellence. 



Key Responsibilities



• Oversee all phases of assigned projects remotely, from preconstruction through final punch and closeout

• Develop and maintain detailed project schedules, budgets, and work plans

• Coordinate and communicate with project superintendents, subcontractors, and field teams to ensure project milestones are achieved

• Review and manage project documentation, including submittals, RFIs, change orders, and meeting minutes

• Ensure compliance with project specifications, drawings, and contract requirements

• Support safety initiatives by collaborating with field superintendents to enforce compliance with OSHA and Structura’s safety protocols

• Collaborate with clients, architects, and engineers to resolve challenges and maintain project 
ntum

• Prepare and review project reports, including financial tracking, budget updates, and work-in-place verification

• Manage project information and communication using Procore, Autodesk Project Management, 
, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Sage Intacct

• Ensure all work complies with ICC Building Codes, including California and Minnesota-specific requirements

• Maintain proactive and transparent communication with all project stakeholders

________________________________________

? What You’ll Bring

• Minimum 7 years of experience working for a U.S.-based company in a project management role for commercial and mixed-use construction

• Proven experience managing complex construction projects from ground-up through closeout

• In-depth knowledge of Procore, Autodesk Project Management, 
, and other project management platforms

• Strong technical understanding of construction processes, project sequencing, and subcontractor management

• Familiarity with ICC Building Codes, with specific knowledge of California and Minnesota standards

• Strong financial acumen, with experience tracking project costs and progress against budgets

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a collaborative, team-focused mindset

• Ability to read and interpret plans, shop drawings, and project specifications

• Commitment to quality, safety, and continuous improvement





Why Structura Builders?

• We build with purpose and precision

• Our leadership empowers remote tea
mbers to make an impact

• You’ll join a tight-knit team that values innovation and collaboration

• We don’t just manage projects — we execute with pride

title: Experienced Virtual Assistant for Manhattan Real Estate Firm
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a self-motivated, autonomous, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support a high-performing real estate executive based in Manhattan, New York. This is an all-encompassing role that blends administrative support, transaction coordination, marketing, and light accounting. You’ll be a critical partner, helping to organize operations, streamline communication, and grow our digital presence.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Executive Support & Communications



Manage a high volume of
s across multiple inboxes and respond with professionalism.

Coordinate a dynamic calendar: book meetings, client calls, property showings, and personal appointments.

Discreetly manage sensitive contacts and information.



2. Transaction Coordination



Track deal progress from lead to close.

Support in preparing LOIs, leases, and due diligence documentation.

Liaise with attorneys, brokers, and clients to ensure smooth transactions.



3. Accounting & Bookkeeping



Tag expenses and manage cash flow using QuickBooks Online.

Generate and send invoices.

Maintain simple spreadsheets for budgeting and financial tracking.



4. Research & Data Entry



Research and compile lists of Tenants, Landlords, and Building Owners.

Maintain and update property and contact spreadsheets with accuracy.



5. Marketing & Content



Convert blog posts and newsletters into platform-specific content.

Manage and post across Instagram, LinkedIn, and Google My Business using cohesive brand storytelling.

Use tools like Canva to create compelling visuals.

Schedule and publish content using tools like Later or Buffer.



6. Website & CRM Management



Maintain and create webpages on Wix, especially for active listings.

Keep CRM (Followupbpss) organized with appropriate customer tagging and tracking.

Update listing sites and syndication platforms with accurate and timely data.



7. Travel & Logistics



Arrange domestic and international travel, including flights, hotels, and car services.

Maintain an organized travel calendar and prepare itineraries.



Qualifications:

Minimum 3 years of experience supporting real estate executives or founders (U.S. experience preferred).

Excellent written and spoken English communication.

Proven ability to work autonomously, prioritize tasks, and take initiative.



Proficiency with:



Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

QuickBooks Online

Canva

CRM platforms

Wix (or willingness to learn quickly)

Mailchimp, Instagram, LinkedIn



Details:

Full-time, Remote (Philippines-based)



Working hours: Primarily U.S. Eastern Time, with flexibility



Competitive pay based on experience and performance



To Apply:



Please submit:



Your resume



A brief note about your relevant experience



A short portfolio or examples of visual content or web pages you’ve created (if available)



Required: Complete the assignment listed here. 
 



What We Offer:



Work with a tight-knit, supportive, and respectful team.



Flexibility and independence: we trust you to manage your time and responsibilities.



Opportunities for bonuses based on strong performance and/or successful generation of new business leads.



Direct access to a founder with clear goals and a vision to grow — your work will make a meaningful difference.

title: Kajabi Community Manager
description:
We’re looking for someone who can take ownership of our Kajabi community and turn it into a space that is engaged, responsive, and well-run. This is not just a posting role—you are responsible for the overall experience inside the community.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Welcome and onboard new members so they feel oriented and included

Keep conversations active through thoughtful prompts and follow-ups

Respond to member questions clearly, promptly, and professionally

Moderate discussions with good judgment and strong boundaries

Post updates, announcements, and engagement content

title: (3) Full-Time Appointment Setter / Cold Caller – AU Leads (PH-Based
description:
JOB TITLE:

Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that works with service-based businesses (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.), primarily in the US market. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can create scroll-stopping content across multiple formats.



You'll be our go-to creative person — editing short-form videos for social media, producing ad creatives for Meta and Google campaigns, and designing graphics for our clients' brands. You'll also work with AI tools like HeyGen and ElevenLabs to produce AI-generated video and voiceover content.



This isn't a "just cut clips together" role. You'll be creating content that directly drives leads and sales for real businesses, so you need to understand what makes people stop scrolling, click, and take action.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) — fast-paced, hook-driven, optimized for engagement

-Create video ads for Meta and Google campaigns (direct response style)

-Produce client deliverables such as testimonial videos, promo videos, and brand content

-Use AI video/voice tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs) to create and enhance content

-Design static graphics — social media posts, ad creatives, thumbnails, banners

-Collaborate with our team on content strategy and creative direction

-Maintain consistent quality and meet turnaround deadlines



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 2 years of experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-Strong graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum; Photoshop/Illustrator is a plus)

-Experience editing short-form, direct-response, or social media content (not just vlogs or cinematic edits)

-Familiarity with AI content tools — HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar platforms

-Good eye for typography, color, and layout

-Understands hooks, pacing, and what performs well on social platforms

-Reliable internet connection and able to work during reasonable overlap hours

-Can manage multiple projects and hit deadlines without constant follow-up



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience designing or building landing pages (using tools like GoHighLevel, WordPress, Unbounce, or similar)

-Background working in or with a digital marketing agency

-Basic understanding of paid ads and what makes a creative convert

-Motion graphics or animation skills



COMPENSATION:

-Full-time position

-Salary is open and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

-Long-term role with room to grow as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY:



Important: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Creative" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:



-A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

-Links to your portfolio or samples of your work (video edits, graphics, landing pages if applicable)

-Which AI tools you've used and how you've used them

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start



We review every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Finance Manager
description:
We are a performance-driven e-commerce and D2C operation focused on building and scaling brands. We are looking for a hands-on Finance Manager to take full ownership of our internal finance function. This is a fully remote, full-time role (150 hours/month) with a flexible schedule: no fixed hours, output-focused.



What you will be doing:

Own day-to-day bookkeeping, journals, accruals, prepayments, and accounting entries

Lead month-end close and deliver accurate management accounts on time

Prepare a monthly Finance Package (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Working Capital, VAT/sales tax summary, variance commentary)

Own all balance sheet reconciliations: bank, payment providers, tax accounts, intercompany, accruals

Manage VAT/sales tax reconciliations and reporting

Act as the main internal point of contact for external accountants, tax advisors, and auditors

Monitor cash position, working capital, and key finance risks

Surface issues early and improve finance processes and internal controls



Requirements:

CPA, ACCA, ACA, or equivalent professional accounting qualification

5+ years of hands-on finance/accounting experience

Strong IFRS knowledge

Solid experience with month-end close, management accounts, and balance sheet reconciliations

Experience with VAT/sales tax reconciliations

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

Experience in e-commerce, D2C, or multi-entity businesses is a strong advantage



To apply, please answer the following questions in your application:



1. Do you hold a CPA, ACCA, ACA, or equivalent qualification? Please specify which and when it was obtained.

2. Describe your hands-on experience with month-end close and producing management accounts. What systems have you used and how many entities were you responsible for?

3. What is your experience with VAT or sales tax reconciliations? Please give a specific example.

4. Have you worked in e-commerce or D2C businesses? If yes, describe the business and the finance challenges you dealt with.

5. Are you available full-time (150 hrs/month) and what is your monthly salary expectation in USD?



Please answer each question from your own experience. Short and direct answers are okay. Generic or AI-written answers will not be considered. Thank you for your time.

title: Podcast Production QA & Support Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a Podcast Production QA & Support Specialist for a long-term, stable role on our team.



This is not a beginner role, and it is not just an editing role.



We need someone who understands the full podcast production process well enough to review deliverables for quality, catch issues before they reach the client, and jump into production tasks when needed to help the tea
et deadlines.



You should have hands-on experience with podcast production and content workflows, including editing, show notes, titles, platform-specific packaging, short-form content, and creative assets. You do not need to be the primary person doing every task all day, but you do need to understand the process deeply enough to spot problems quickly and step in confidently when necessary.



We’re looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, proactive, and wants to grow with a team long term.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Review podcast deliverables before they are sent to clients or published

• Catch issues in audio, video, show notes, titles, timestamps, graphics, clips, and other content assets

• Make sure work meets internal standards, client expectations, and platform best practices

• Help ensure projects stay on schedule and nothing slips through the cracks

• Support the production team during busy periods or deadline pressure

• Jump into editing, writing, repurposing, packaging, or related production tasks when needed

• Review content with an understanding of the difference between audio platforms, YouTube, and short-form social content

• Check for accuracy, polish, completeness, consistency, and brand alignment

• Help improve workflows, handoffs, checklists, and quality control systems over time

• Communicate clearly with the team and flag issues early



You are a strong fit if you:



• Have real experience working in podcast production or closely related content workflows

• Understand the full production process from raw files to final deliverables

• Can identify quality issues quickly and explain what needs to be fixed

• Have strong judgment, not just task execution

• Can jump into production work when needed and actually know what you’re doing

• Are highly organized and dependable

• Pay close attention to detail without losing sight of deadlines

• Can write clearly in English

• Understand the difference between content for Spotify and Apple Podcasts, YouTube, and short-form social platforms

• Want a long-term role with room to grow



You Should Be Comfortable Reviewing, Giving Feedback and Supporting Work Such As



• Audio and video podcast edits

• Show notes and episode descriptions

• Episode titles

• Timestamps

• YouTube packaging and presentation

• Shorts, reels, and clips

• Social media graphics and supporting assets

• General production handoff quality and completeness



This Role Is NOT For You If



• You do not have hands-on podcast or content production experience

• You only know one part of the process and cannot think across the full workflow

• You need constant direction to spot obvious problems

• You are only looking for short-term freelance work

• You struggle with deadlines, follow-through, or communication

• You cannot switch between reviewing work and executing work when needed

• You do not pay close attention to detail

• You disappear and leave the team hanging



To apply, follow these instructions exactly. Applications that do not follow the instructions will be ignored.



1) Start your application with this exact line:



Quality First, Deadlines Matter



2) Include the following:



• Your full name

• Country and timezone

• Weekly availability

• Tools and software you use

• Internet speed

• Computer specs

• How many podcast episodes or client accounts you can realistically help oversee each week

• Your CV, portfolio, website if you have one



3) Send 3 relevant samples only



These must include:



• At least 1 example of a podcast or interview-style episode you worked on

• At least 1 example of a short-form clip or repurposed asset

• At least 1 example that shows your involvement in quality control, packaging, review, or final delivery standards



For each sample, explain exactly what you did.



4) Answer these questions in full sentences:



• A. When reviewing a podcast episode before delivery, what are the main things you check?

• B. What is the difference between content that is ready for Audio Podcasts versus content that is ready for YouTube?

• C. If a deadline is close and an episode still needs fixes, how do you d
 what to prioritize first?

• D. Tell us about a time you caught an issue before it reached a client or audience. What was the issue, and how did you handle it?

• E. Tell us about a time you had to jump into production work to help a team hit a deadline. What did you do?



5) Include this exact line somewhere in your application:



I am looking for a long-term role and I am comfortable working in both quality control and production support.



Bonus Points If You Also Include



• Before and after examples of work you improved

• Examples of checklists, QA systems, or workflows you helped improve

• Experience working inside an agency or fast-paced production environment

• Examples showing that you understand content strategy, not just technical execution

• Any examples of catching issues in titles, descriptions, graphics, clips, or publishing workflows



This role is for someone who can help us protect quality and keep production moving.



You should be the kind of person who can look at a deliverable, know whether it is truly ready, and step in when needed to help get it across the finish line.



If that sounds like you, apply carefully and follow the instructions exactly.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Data Analyst (SQL + Superset) | Remote | Long Term



We are looking for a highly capable Data Analyst to support a US-based healthcare data team.



This role is focused on exploring datasets, identifying issues, and building reliable dashboards, not just executing predefined tasks.



You should be comfortable working independently and taking ownership of your work.



What you’ll be doing:

- Write advanced SQL queries to analyze and validate data

- Explore datasets to identify inconsistencies, gaps, and potential issues

- Build and maintain dashboards (Apache Superset preferred)

- Perform data QA and proactively flag problems

- Support ad hoc analysis and reporting requests

- Clearly document findings and communicate insights



What we’re looking for:

- Strong SQL skills (joins, aggregations, CTEs, debugging queries)

- Experience with BI tools (Superset strongly preferred, others acceptable)

- Ability to independently explore datasets and find issues

- High attention to detail and data accuracy

- Strong written English communication

- Reliable and responsive (this is very important)



Strong plus:

- Experience working with healthcare data

- Experience with messy or imperfect datasets

- Experience working with US-based clients or teams

- Very comfortable using AI in your tasks



What success looks like in this role:

- You don’t just complete tasks — you identify problems before being asked

- You ask good questions when something doesn’t look right

- You can take a dataset and understand it without heavy guidance



Details:

Remote (anywhere in the world)

15 to 25 hours per week

Rate: $10 to $15 per hour depending on experience

Long term opportunity with increasing responsibility



How to apply:

Please include:

title: Market Research (Physical Products / Manufacturing)
description:
I am currently hiring a Virtual Assistant to support me in Product Management responsibilities within a manufacturing environment focused on physical products.



Important: This is not an IT, software, or technology product management role. I am specifically looking for experience related to physical products, materials, or manufacturing.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Read the following, and if you are interested, Submit Your Application Below:





-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Role Overview:

Starting rate: $4/hour

Initial commitment: 5–10 hours per week

Expected growth: Up to 30+ hours per week over time

Opportunity for increased compensation as skills and responsibilities expand



Preferred Qualifications:

*2+ years of experience with physical products or manufacturing (required)

*Experience identifying TAM, SAM, and SOM (regional and global)

*Project management experience

*Market research experience in manufacturing or industrial products

*Understanding of the product lifecycle

*Ability to interpret and synthesize data

*Proficiency in Google Docs, Word, PowerPoint

*Ability to identify trends and insights from data



Key Responsibilities:



You will support day-to-day Product Management activities in a manufacturing business, including:

Conducting market research and summarizing insights into PowerPoint presentations

Reviewing large volumes of customer/user feedback (100+ entries) and synthesizing key themes

Translating high-level product concepts into structured requirements (training will be provided)

Creating presentations and reports using provided data

Supporting various ad hoc Product Management tasks



Opportunities for Growth



In this role I am looking for a VA who is eager to grow their own capacity to earn up to $100,000 per year. I don’t just want a VA, I want someone who is interested in learning how to become a Product Manager themselves. I will teach this VA how to be a highly effective Product manager, so that in a years time they can graduate from working with me and gain their own full time role as a product manager earning $100,000+ per year.

Packaging design



Working with dielines



Print-ready file preparation



Ecommerce creatives (Amazon or Shopify)

Detail-oriented



Able to follow instructions exactly



Fast and responsive



Organized with files and revisions



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Amazon A+ experience



Shopify design experience



Mockup creation skills



Work Setup



Part-time (15–20 hours per week)



Remote



Long-term opportunity



Compensation



$350/month



Potential increase based on performance



Opportunity to grow with the company



How to Apply (Important)



To be considered, you MUST follow all steps below. Applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.



Step 1



Start your application with this exact phrase:

PREMIUM DESIGNER – READY

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
MUST SEND A 60 SECOND LOOM WITH YOUR EXPERIENCE TO BE CONSIDERED FOR POSITION!



Virtual Assistant for Credit Repair and Financial Literacy



Location: Remote



Are you passionate about helping others achieve financial freedom and literacy? We are seeking a skilled Virtual Assistant to join our team and assist clients in disputing inaccurate credit reports and navigating the complex world of credit repair and financial literacy.



YOU MUST RECORD A 2 MIN OR 60 SECOND VIDEO EXPLAINING YOUR KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ALONG WITH PROVEN RESULTS OF YOUR WORK OR YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities:

- Dispute inaccurate credit reports on behalf of clients, adhering to the laws outlined in the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

- File complaints with consumer protection agencies such as the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), Better Business Bureau (BBB), and Attorney General's office when necessary.

- Utilize extensive knowledge of the credit repair process in America to provide expert guidance and support to clients.

- Communicate effectively with clients to address their concerns, answer inquiries, and provide updates on the dispute process.

- Demonstrate true determination and heart in advocating for clients' rights and financial well-being.



Qualifications:

- Previous experience working with a credit repair company, with a strong understanding of the credit repair process.

- Extensive knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and other relevant laws governing credit reporting and repair.

- Proven ability to file complaints with consumer protection agencies, such as the CFPB, BBB, and Attorney General's office.

- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to empathize and connect with clients.

- True determination and heart to help clients overcome financial challenges and achieve their goals.



Benefits:

- Flexible remote work environment.

- Opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the lives of others.

- Competitive compensation package.



If you have a passion for helping others and possess the skills and qualifications listed above, we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team and make a difference in the world of credit repair and financial literacy.



3 Commas Solutions is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or other protected status.

title: Claude AI Expert for Ad Research & High-Converting Recruiting Ads (Life Insurance Niche)
description:
Overview



I’m a life insurance agent scaling a team by recruiting high-ticket sales professionals (setters & closers).



I’m looking for a Claude Code expert who can combine:



AI-powered research

Marketing strategy

Ad creative development



Your role is to identify, analyze, and replicate winning ads—then turn them into high-converting recruiting ads tailored to my niche.



This is NOT a basic VA role. I’m looking for someone who can think, analyze, and build systems.



What You’ll Be Doing

Use Claude (with code capabilities) to:

Research ads across platforms (Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google)

Analyze large volumes of ads and extract patterns

Break down winning ads into:

Hooks

Messaging

Offers

Emotional triggers

Identify what makes ads perform and why

Create:

Short-form video ad scripts (TikTok / Reels style)

Written ad copy

Multiple hook variations for testing

Continuously improve ads based on findings and performance

Requirements (MUST HAVE)

Strong experience using Claude AI with code capabilities

You understand how to use Claude beyond basic prompting

You can analyze, structure, and extract insights from data

Strong understanding of:

Direct response marketing

High-converting ad creatives

Ability to:

Think critically and identify patterns (not just generate content)

Strong English writing skills

BONUS (Highly Preferred)

Experience with:

Meta Ads Library / TikTok Creative Center

Recruiting ads or high-ticket sales ads

Insurance, finance, or opportunity-based marketing

Experience with n8n (or similar tools like Zapier / Make)

Ability to build workflows that automate ad research and analysis

Basic coding or scripting experience (Python, APIs, scraping tools)

Experience building repeatable AI + automation systems

Compensation

Competitive (based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to ad results

Opportunity for long-term growth

To Apply



Please include ALL of the following:



Examples of your work (ads, copy, or AI workflows)

A short Loom video (2–3 minutes) explaining:

How you would use Claude Code to find and analyze winning ads

Describe ONE workflow you would build using Claude (and n8n if applicable) to improve ad performance

Share one ad you think is currently “winning” and explain why



Who This Is Perfect For



Someone who:



Knows how to use AI as a research and analysis engine

Can combine technical skills + marketing thinking

Enjoys reverse-engineering what makes ads work

Wants to build systems—not just complete tasks



If you understand both AI systems AND marketing psychology, this role is for you.

title: Media Quality and Delivery Specialist VA
description:
DEPARTMENT: Project Coordination

REPORTS TO: CEO

WORK HOURS, PART TIME: 9AM-12PM, 8PM-10PM Mountain Time or similar

STARTING SALARY: $5 per hour

POTENTIAL SALARY: $600-$800 / Month



SUMMARY

We’re looking for someone smart, organized, and excited to grow with us! If you’re a positive, detail-oriented person who loves to learn, takes feedback well, and wants to be part of a close-knit, supportive team, we’d love to meet you.

This is a long-term role for someone who’s ready to take on more responsibility over time and become a key part of our journey.



Who We Are:

Chelwood Media is a woman-run real estate media company based in Utah. We create amazing photo and video content for realtors, and we’re known for our fast turnaround, friendly service, and high-quality work. Our team is growing quickly, and we’re passionate about doing great work and loving the team we work with.

If you’re looking for a place where your ideas matter, you’ll be supported, and you can grow, this might be the perfect fit.



Job Summary

Manage, review for quality, upload, and retouch photos and video on a daily basis. Follow up with the editing team on project status. Maintain communication with the admin team.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Project Management

Send out projects before 12 PM Mountain Time

Quality Control for Deliverables (Photos, Videos, 3D Tours)

Make edits to photos in photoshop/lightroom as needed

Make edits to Videos as needed

Communicate with Admin team on deliveries



SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

Ability to take on several tasks at once.

EXTREME attention to detail.

Excellent English speaking and written.

Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software experience.

Proficient in Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Lightroom, Slack.

Preferred proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro/Final Cut Pro/Capcut.

Fast learner and willing to learn



INSTRUCTION TO APPLY

To be considered, please do all of the following: 

 
 your resume, internet speed, and a video recording of you answering the following four questions:

Please tell us about yourself, what do you love?

Please detail your past work experience and how it relates to this job at Chelwood Media. Why do you believe you would be a great candidate for this position?

Do you have leadership or management experience?

title: Video Editor Viral Short-Form Content / Reels - TikTok - YouTube Shorts
description:
We are a creative media team working on two exciting projects: the launch campaign of an emerging music

artist and the promotional campaign for a feature film releasing in October. We are looking for talented

Filipino video editors who understand what makes content go viral on Western social media platforms and

can produce high-quality short-form videos consistently.



What you will be working on



You will edit short-form videos for two distinct campaigns running simultaneously:



MUSIC CAMPAIGN

Pairing songs of a new artist with fitting video clips

– animal footage, anime edits, epic cinematic

scenes, landscapes, emotional moments. 



The goal: organic virality that puts the music in

people's heads.





FILM CAMPAIGN

Creating appetite-building clips from film footage –

suspenseful cuts, emotional hooks, engaging

subtitles – designed to make people curious and

talk about the film before its October release 2026 in all german cinemas and on Netflix.





What we are looking for



? Strong instinct for what makes content go viral on Western platforms (TikTok US/EU,

Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



? Proficiency in at least one professional editing tool (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci

Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)



? Good PC/laptop and reliable internet connection – you must be able to handle video files and

deliver on time



? Ability to follow creative briefs and direction closely while bringing your own creative sense to

the execution



? Good English comprehension – you will receive instructions and feedback in English



? Available 4–6 hours per day, on a consistent schedule, for a duration of several months



Nice to have

Experience creating viral content yourself · Knowledge of current trends on Western TikTok /

Instagram Reels · Skills in subtitle styling and motion typography · Portfolio or examples of past edits

Compensation



Base rate: €4 EUR / hour 



Rate is performance-based and can go higher or lower depending on

quality, consistency, and results. 

Strong performers will be rewarded.



We are looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off.



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical editing test: we will send you raw video material

and a brief set of instructions. You will independently create a short-form video from this footage

according to our guidelines. This test is how we evaluate your instinct, creativity, and ability to follow

direction – no lengthy interviews, just your work speaking for itself.



How to apply

1. A short introduction – who you are, your editing background, and which tools you use

2. At least 2–3 examples of your video editing work (links to YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, etc.)

3. Your available hours per day and time zone

4. Your PC specs and which editing software you currently use



We are actively looking for young, hungry talent who genuinely understand social media and want to grow

with us. If you have the eye and the drive, we want to hear from you

title: Cinematic Birthday Film (5–6 min) with English Voice Narration – Documentary Style
description:
Cinematic Birthday Film (5–6 min) with English Voice Narration – Documentary Style



Description:



I am looking for an experienced video editor to create a 5–6 minute cinematic documentary-style film for a formal 70th birthday event.



This video will be shown at the beginning of a banquet function, so it must be high quality, emotionally engaging, and professionally polished.



Project Overview:



The film will tell a life story using:

- Curated family photos

- Travel & adventure photos

- Historical/early life images

- A few short video clips



I will provide:

- A complete narration script (English)

- Organized photos and video files

- General structure and guidance



IMPORTANT – Voice Narration Required:



The final video must include:

- Professional English voice-over narration

- Clear, warm, documentary-style tone

- Proper pacing with pauses for emotional impact



Please confirm if you:

- Provide voice-over yourself

OR

- Work with a voice artist



Style & Expectations:



This is NOT a simple slideshow.



I am looking for:

- Cinematic storytelling (documentary style)

- Smooth pacing and emotional flow

- Subtle transitions (no flashy effects)

- Slow zoom (Ken Burns style)

- Clean, elegant text overlays

- Music synced with narration

- Proper use of silence and timing



Music:

- Cinematic instrumental (royalty-free)

- Emotional but not overly dramatic



Deliverables:

- Final video in MP4 format (1080p or 4K)

- Optimized for large screen / banquet hall playback

- Voice narration included and synced

- One preview version + revisions before final



Timeline:

- Prefer delivery within 5–7 days



Tone:

Balanced:

- Elegant

- Emotional

- With some light joyful moments



To Apply, Please Include:



1. 2–3 samples of similar work (family film, wedding, documentary, tribute video)

2. Sample of voice-over narration (very important)

3. Editing software used (Premiere Pro, After Effects, etc.)

4. Estimated cost and turnaround time



Bonus (Optional):

I may request a short 20–30 second sample edit using my photos before final selection.



Budget:

Open to proposals (fixed price preferred)



Note:

This is a meaningful personal project, so attention to detail and storytelling is very important.

title: SEO Content Creator (High-Quality, Publish-Ready Articles)
description:
I’m looking for a skilled SEO content creator to join my team.



This is not a basic writing job.



I need someone who understands SEO properly and can turn a simple keyword into a high-quality, fully optimised article that is ready to publish (I'll teach you how to write content briefs that rank on Google for my audience which is in New Zealand).



?? IMPORTANT – READ THIS FIRST



To be considered for this role, your application must include the secret word found in this job post.



If you do not include the secret word, your application will be ignored.



Also:



You must have at least 10 application points

If you have less than 10, you will not be considered

The more application points you have, the higher your chances of getting hired



There will also be a quick 30-minute trial task to confirm your skills.



Here's what You’ll Be Doing:



Your main role will be creating high-quality SEO content for my website.



The goal is simple:



I give you a keyword.

You give me a finished article.



For example:



Keyword: AI SEO



You produce a complete article that includes:



Proper SEO structure (H1, H2, H3)

Strong keyword targeting

Clean formatting

Internal linking

High-quality, relevant images

Image alt text

Well-written, engaging content

Supporting stats, studies, or credible sources

A publish-ready article that I can quickly review and upload.

.

You handle everything else

Step-by-step, actionable processes

Real examples

Supporting statistics and credible sources

Internal linking

Clean formatting



The standard is simple:



Your content should match or exceed the quality of the articles I’ve already published.

Additional Expectations



Within that same 1–2 month period, you should also:



Be confident creating content briefs (I will show you the process)

Be handling digital PR / link building
 responses daily

Require minimal hand-holding



What You Need to Be Good At

Understanding search intent

Creating content briefs (which I'll teach you how to do)

Formatting content properly

Finding and including relevant statistics or studies

Basic on-page SEO best practices



If you’ve only done basic blog writing with no SEO behind it, this role is not for you.



Do NOT Apply If

You rely heavily on AI without properly editing

You need constant supervision



Application Requirements

Links to 2–3 of your best SEO articles

Pay & Growth

title: Senior Short-Form Video Editor
description:
Job Role: Senior Short-Form Video Editor



APPLICATION FORM: 



**Note: While we are looking to fill a full-time role as the primary objective, we are also looking for contract/freelance video editors as well to assist with overflow work as well. Please state which applies to you in your application.



Work Schedule: While initially this role would be per-job basis, moving into a retainer once we are both happy and potentially even into a full time role, some overlap with Brisbane time frame is appreciated.



We are looking for an experience short-form video editor to join our team. You will be working closely with our Social Media Management team to produce high quality, short form reels which engage, educate, entertain and inspire.



A deep understanding of social media content, pacing, hooks and retention techniques as well as overall creativity will be paramount in this role. You will need to be able to follow a brief and client guidelines as well as know when it's ok to do something a little different in order to get the best results.



You will also be somewhat of a "Creative Director" in that we will also be relying on you to set the standards for creativity for each client, by understanding their brand and seeing it as what it could be and provide new ideas.



Please see some examples of the type of work we do and what you will be working on: 



A bit about us: 



A dynamic creative marketing agency located in Brisbane, that focuses on crafting compelling content, producing videos, managing social media, and developing brand strategies to help businesses communicate their message. Built on the idea that thoughtful storytelling creates real impact, the team emphasizes creativity, innovation, and a collaborative, supportive workplace culture.



Role Overview: 



We're looking for a Senior Short-Form Video Editor to join this Brisbane-based creative agency specialising in content creation and social media management for B2B and service-based businesses.



In this role, you'll transform raw footage into scroll-stopping Instagram Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn videos. You'll work across multiple client brands, delivering high-volume, high-quality content that drives real engagement and results.



You'll report to the Social Media Manager and collaborate closely with our Social Media Coordinator, Senior Video Editor, and Videographer. We provide all software, storage, and systems — you bring the talent and your own editing workstation.



What Success Looks Like:



Consistently producing platform-native video content that looks like it belongs on each client's feed — not like it came from a template factory. You nail the hook in the first 3 seconds, maintain energy throughout, and deliver clean endings that leave viewers satisfied.



You hit deadlines reliably, flag issues early, and require minimal revisions because you've internalised each client's brand guidelines. Your 18th video of the week looks as sharp as your 1st.



This role suits editors who bring creative flair while thriving within defined processes. You're not just executing — you're injecting energy, personality, and storytelling craft into every edit.



What You'll Do:



- Edit short-form videos (30-90 seconds) from raw footage including podcasts, interviews, events, and B2B content

- Apply retention editing techniques: pattern interrupts, dynamic pacing, strategic zooms, visual hooks

- Create burnt-in captions with accurate timing, spelling, and brand-consistent styling

- Build motion graphics elements: lower thirds, callouts, kinetic text, animated transitions

- Export multiple versions per video (9:16, 1:1, 4:5) and custom thumbnails as required

- Maintain brand consistency across high-volume batch production

- Follow established workflows using ClickUp (project management) and Dropbox (footage & review)



Requirements:



- 3+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve

- Strong proficiency in Adobe After Effects

- Intermediate to expert motion graphics skills (lower thirds, kinetic text, animated elements)

- Proven portfolio showcasing short-form social video content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

- Strong understanding of retention editing and platform-specific pacing

- Caption creation expertise with excellent spelling and grammar

- Audio editing fundamentals (levels, EQ, noise reduction)

- Basic colour correction skills

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Own workstation suitable for video editing (multi-core processor, 16GB+ RAM, dedicated GPU, SSD storage)

- Reliable high-speed internet connection



Nice to Have:



-Advanced colour grading capabilities



What We Offer:



- Full-time, stable position with an established creative agency

- All software provided (Adobe Creative Cloud, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

- Storage drives provided - Initially we will need you to provide your own hard drives etc however long term we would deliver you a NAS.

- Work across diverse client brands in property, professional services, hospitality, trades, allied health and more

- Clear processes and brand guidelines — no guesswork

- Supportive team environment with weekly check-ins



Work Arrangement & Expectations:



- This is a remote role that will be set up via an Employer of Record (EOR) service.

- To ensure alignment and transparency, successful candidates will be expected to:

- Be available for meetings and collaboration during core [AEST] business hours

- Disclose any existing ongoing roles or client work



If you think this job could suit you, please apply using the form below so we can ensure a streamlined experience for both parties.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer – Social Media & Presentations

Remote | Australian Creative Agency | Philippines Preferred

Full-time for the right person, however we will also consider ongoing freelance arrangements with an ongoing retainer/agreed work per month.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Hey there!



We're a creative agency that helps businesses tell their stories through photography, videography, social media, and Meta advertising. We've been around since 2017 and currently manage growing retainer client base across B2B and service-based industries.



We're looking for a Graphic Designer to join our team and take ownership of our visual design output — both the social media content we create for clients and the internal materials that represent our own brand.



Being able to adapt/enhance a client's existing brand is also important. Some clients come to us with excellent brand playbooks and assets, others have a font and a logo and then it's up to us to get creative with it. So someone who who can develop the brand is important too.



If you're someone who takes real pride in clean, polished design work, can manage multiple brands without mixing them up, and can make a pitch deck look like it belongs in a boardroom — keep reading.



What You'll Actually Be Doing:



Client Social Media Design (the majority of your time):



- Designing carousels, static posts, video thumbnails, and story assets for our retainer clients across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

- Working within established brand guidelines for each client — you'll manage multiple brand identities simultaneously

- Receiving briefs through ClickUp and delivering designs for internal review before they go to the client

- Maintaining visual consistency across each client's content so their feed looks intentional, not random



Internal & Agency Design:



- Updating and designing our pitch decks and proposals — these are what we use to win new clients, so they need to look sharp

- Creating and formatting strategy presentations and content plans for client delivery

- Designing internal templates, one-pagers, capability statements, and other brand collateral

- Producing social media content for Narrative Hub's own channels

- Refining the visual format of our monthly client reports



The Tools You'll Work With:



- Canva (Pro): Our preferred tool for day-to-day social media designs. Many clients have existing Canva templates that you'll build on and maintain. We're flexible on tools as long as the quality is there and revisions can be turned around quickly.

- Adobe Creative Suite: Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign for more complex work — pitch decks, detailed presentations, advanced graphics, and anything that needs precision layout. We need you to be genuinely proficient here, not just familiar.

- ClickUp: Where all briefs, feedback, time tracking, and task management lives. This is our central hub.

- Dropbox: File storage and sharing for all working files and final deliverables.

- PowerPoint / Google Slides: For presentation design and formatting as needed.

- We provide all software subscriptions (Adobe, Canva Pro, etc.), Dropbox storage, and ClickUp access. You provide your own hardware and a reliable internet connection.



What We're Looking For



Must-haves:



- 3+ years of professional graphic design experience, ideally in an agency or managing multiple brand accounts

- Strong portfolio showing social media design work — carousels, static posts, branded content

- Experience designing presentations and pitch decks to a high standard

- Proficient in both Canva and Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

- Solid understanding of typography, layout, visual hierarchy, and brand application

- Detail-oriented — you notice when spacing is off, a colour is wrong, or a font doesn't match

- Clear written communication in English

- Comfortable with feedback and revisions — it's part of the process, not a personal critique



Good to have:



- Experience working with Australian businesses or in a similar time zone

- Familiarity with social media platform specs and best practices (image sizes, safe zones, etc.)

- Experience with B2B or service-based brands specifically



What You Won't Be Doing



Just to set expectations:



- No video editing (we have dedicated editors for that)

- No social media scheduling or community management

- No photography or videography

- No website design or development

- No Meta ad campaign management



You won't be expected to write copy, but you may need to take our briefs and alter them to suit the designs. If you are very capable at copywriting, we will be happy for you to assist with writing copy for these posts as well, however it won't be necessary.



How We Work



You'll have a dual reporting structure:



- Social Media Manager/Coordinator: manages your day-to-day client work — they'll brief you, review your designs, and keep you aligned with content calendars

- Managing Director: will brief you directly on all internal work — pitch decks, proposals, strategy presentations, and internal branding.

- The Social Media Coordinator will also work closely with you on content calendar alignment and design briefs.



Our process is straightforward:



- You receive a brief in ClickUp with all the details — client, content type, messaging, brand assets

- You design, tracking your time in ClickUp as you go

- Internal review (1 round) — Social Media Manager or Coordinator for client work, MD for internal work.

- Client approval (1 round) — managed by the Social Media Manager

- Final files exported and saved to Dropbox, ready for scheduling

- If a brief is unclear, we expect you to ask before you start — not after you've completed a draft.



The Details



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred

Employment Type: To be confirmed (may be full-time via EOR or contract)

Hours: Minimum 6–8 hours overlap with Brisbane business hours (9am–5pm AEST)

Communication: ClickUp for tasks and feedback, ClickUp Chat for quick questions and check-ins

Start Date: TBC



Interested?



- If this sounds like a good fit, we'd love to hear from you. In your application, please share fill out the below form so we can assess your application:



APPLICATION FORM: 



Please be sure to include in the form:



- A link to your portfolio (or a few examples of your best social media design and presentation work)

- A brief overview of your experience — especially if you've worked in an agency or managed multiple brands

- Which tools you're most comfortable in (Canva, Adobe Suite, or both) and how you typically approach a design brief

- Any other information it asks for



Thank you and we wish you the best with your application!

mber to join our growing brand family.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Automation & Systems Integrator (n8n, CRM, APIs, WhatsApp)
description:
About the Role



We are a short-term rental management company (Nova Escapes) operating across Bali and Australia.



We have an existing automation and integration system partially built (n8n, CRM, WhatsApp, payments), and we are looking for someone to step in, complete key integrations, and get the system working end-to-end.



This is a project-based role, not full-time employment.

We are looking for someone who can deliver outcomes, not ongoing dependency.



Scope (Phase 1 – Immediate Work)



We need someone to complete and stabilise the following:

- Set up and finalise CRM pipelines and automations (GoHighLevel)

- Connect WhatsApp API and enable messaging flows

- Integrate Guesty with CRM and WhatsApp

- Connect Xendit (Payment processor) to SuiteOp and Guesty for payment links and workflows

- Integrate SuiteOp for guest experience triggers

- Set up Slack notifications for internal team



The goal is a simple, working system — not over-engineered.



First Task (Paid Trial)

The first task will be:

- Review our current n8n workflows and system setup

- Identify what is working vs broken

- Fix key issues and complete core integrations

- Get one end-to-end flow working (lead ? CRM ? WhatsApp ? payment)



You should be able to clearly explain:

- what you would check first

- what you would fix first

- how you would simplify the system



Current Stack:

- Guesty (PMS)

- GoHighLevel (CRM)

- SuiteOp (Guest Portal and Tasks)

- n8n (automation)

- WhatsApp API (in progress)

- Xendit, Stripe, Merchant Warrior (payments)

- Slack (not setup yet)

- Google  

- Dropbox



What We’re Looking For

- Strong experience with automation tools (n8n, Make, APIs, webhooks)

- Experience building CRM pipelines and automation flows

- Ability to connect multiple systems end-to-end

- Comfortable reviewing and improving an existing system (not starting from scratch)

- Able to debug and fix broken workflows (not just build from scratch)

- Able to work with incomplete or messy systems and bring clarity

- Experience with AI integrations (e.g. OpenAI, Gemini, chatbots, or AI workflows)

- Ability to implement simple, practical AI use cases (not over-engineered systems)

- Strong focus on getting systems working first, then layering AI where useful

- Focus on simplicity, reliability, and execution



Not The Right Fit

- Web developers or designers

- Anyone without API / integration experience

- Anyone who over-engineers or builds unnecessary complexity



Engagement

- Start with a paid audit + implementation (20–30 hours)

- If a good fit, we will continue with ongoing tasks as needed

- We are NOT looking for someone full-time or long-term dependency



How to Apply

Please include:

- Examples of automation/integration systems you have built

- Tools you have worked with (n8n, APIs, CRM, etc.)

- A short explanation of how you would approach fixing and simplifying an existing system



Screening Question (Required)

- If a WhatsApp message is received, but the contact is not being created in the CRM:

- What are the first 3 things you would check?



Final Note

We are looking for someone who can get things working quickly and cleanly — not someone who builds complex systems that take months to complete.

title: COO/Management Residential Appraisal Report Writer
description:
We are a successful residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California. We employ over 10 on the team and are looking for a very senior level experienced residential appraisal report writer to lead our team.



The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for someone with experience completing the entire report, including commentary, who ideally has experience with managing and leading other appraisal report writers. Your role will effectively be acting as chief operating officer of our company while also being directly involved in reports.



Your role and responsibilities include the following:

1. Ensuring every report is completed to our standards. Either directly or through the processes and procedures you develop, it will be your responsibility to ensure that each and every report created by our report writers is free from errors and submission-ready. While this will start by having you directly review each report written by our team before submission, we are in the process of also hiring quality assurance reviewers, who you will lead and manage.

2. Training and managing residential report writers. It will be your responsibility to ensure that all report writers on our tea
et the criteria and standards in place to ensure high quality reports. 

3. Acting as the liaison between leadership and the report writing staff. If there is too much work for the team, you will be in charge of letting leadership know so that additional tea
mbers can be hired. Or if there are any other issues, you will be in charge of resolving them or bringing it to leadership's attention.

4. Acting as the closer. Ultimately, everything on the report writing side will fall under your responsiblity. We are looking for someone who is proactive at solving problems without getting the leadership team involved, however we are of course readily available to help out when needed. In line with this, if the report writing team doesn't have capacity to complete a residential report, you are expected to directly help out and complete these reports while at the same time working towards a solution to address this issue (hiring more, building better processes for writing reports, involving AI, etc).



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have extensive work history writing reports for a US residential appraiser. Ideally you have done this for California properties. You must have extensive experience completing the entire report, everything from data entry to sketch to adjustments, 1004MC, selecting comparables, and commentary.

2. Ideally you have existing management experience, managing other appraisal report writers.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.

9. Do you have experience in reviewing other residential reports? If so, please discuss in detail your responsibilities. 



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

title: Shopify Developer & Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
Job Title: Shopify Developer & Ecommerce Operations Manager

Location: AWST - Local Manilla Timezone

Type: Negotiable based on Candidate



About Us

We are an international fashion brand in hyper-growth, working with top industry agencies. Join our Australian-based team during local hours and help shape premium customer experiences at an exciting time for the brand.



About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled Shopify Developer & Ecommerce Operations Manager to take full ownership of our online store, from technical development to end-to-end operational management. This is a hands-on, strategic role where Shopify development and operational excellence are core responsibilities.



You will ensure our Shopify store is high-performing, visually compelling, and fully integrated with all operational systems, including inventory, fulfillment, and customer service workflows. You will also implement automation solutions that streamline processes and enhance the customer experience.



Core Responsibilities

Shopify Development & Technical Management (Primary Focus)

Build, customise, and maintain Shopify themes, templates, and pages

Implement new design themes, landing pages, and content sections for campaigns or seasonal updates

Optimise site performance, speed, and UX across desktop and mobile devices

Ensure Shopify functionality, checkout, and all integrations are reliable and error-free

Manage app integrations (loyalty, reviews, bundling, subscriptions, upsells) and maintain compatibility with updates

Troubleshoot technical issues and implement ongoing enhancements to improve conversion and usability

Collaborate with marketing and creative teams to implement campaign-specific Shopify updates



Ecommerce Operations & End-to-End Solutions

Manage products, pricing, collections, and inventory with accuracy and consistency in Shopify

Develop & manage supply chain integrations & solutions for inventory tracking and PI to logistics platforms 

Implement customer service systems and automation to enhance responsiveness and efficiency

Monitor orders, track fulfillment, resolve operational issues, and ensure smooth end-to-end order flow

Maintain overall site health and operational reliability, ensuring minimal downtime or errors

Identify process bottlenecks and implement technology-driven solutions to streamline operations

Support scaling initiatives by integrating Shopify with CRM, ERP, and other backend systems



Qualifications



3+ years of Shopify development experience (theme builds, templates, page creation, apps integration)

Strong technical skills in Shopify Liquid, HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript

Deep understanding of ecommerce workflows, inventory management, and supply chain processes

Experience with customer service system integrations, automation, and multi-channel order management

Familiarity with Shopify apps and third-party integrations (loyalty, subscriptions, reviews, upsells, bundling)

Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously

Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with creative, marketing, and external partners



Why Join Us



Lead technical and operational development of a premium ecommerce store

Drive improvements that directly impact revenue, customer experience, and operational efficiency

Collaborate cross-functionally with creative, marketing, and agency teams

Opportunity to design and implement end-to-end automated workflows for ecommerce operations

Play a key role in scaling the business with technical and operational excellence

description:

Business English, daily conversation, kids’ English enlightenment, and adult oral English.



Students:

Students are mainly aged 3–18.

One-on-one classes, 25 minutes per class.



Working Hours (China Time, UTC+8):

Part-time or full-time available. Working hours: 13:00–23:00.

• Full-time: 8 hours per day, including 4 hours during peak hours, the remaining 4 hours can be flexibly arranged.



Difference between Part-time and Full-time:

• Part-time teachers: required to work 4 hours during the specified peak period.

• Full-time teachers: 8 hours per day, 4 hours during peak hours, the other 4 hours can be arranged flexibly.



All completed classes will be paid accordingly. We will arrange classes based on your available time, so you don’t need to worry about scheduling.



2. Position Advantages



Stable income, flexible working hours, remote work, schedule adaptable to your needs, stable student source, high booking volume, and course materials provided (no need to prepare teaching materials by yourself).

title: Social Media And Strategy Manager - FT - Aussie Biz
description:
We are an established Australian trade services business looking for a full-time Social Media and Content Marketing VA.



This role is responsible for building and executing a social media strategy across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube. You will audit our existing channels and content library, develop a strategy grounded in real analysis, create and schedule content daily, manage comments and DMs, and report on performance each month. The business owner appears on camera - everything else is yours to own and execute.



If you have worked in digital marketing, content creation, social media management, or at a marketing agency - and you can point to specific accounts you have genuinely grown from a smaller base - we want to hear from you.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, stable role with a long-established Australian business

* Starting salary of PHP 33,500 per month during probation, increasing to PHP 35,000 per month after probation

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

* Coordinate with the owner for his on-camera video appearances - brief him on what is needed and handle everything else

* Respond to all comments and DMs daily across all platforms

* Pre-qualify or redirect social leads to the sales team where appropriate

* Track performance monthly and report clearly to the owner

* Provide content and UX input on two business websites (supporting role)



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience growing social media followings from a smaller base - you must be able to show numbers, not just titles

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE



* HubSpot or CRM experience

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Flexible hours

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.
